42 namespace stabilizer::parser {
43 
44 bool isIntParam(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
45  auto sort = param->getSort();
46  return sort && (sort->isInt() || sort->isIntOrReal());
47 }
48 bool isRealParam(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
49  auto sort = param->getSort();
50  return sort && (sort->isReal() || sort->isIntOrReal());
51 }
52 bool isBoolParam(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
53  auto sort = param->getSort();
54  return sort && sort->isBool();
55 }
56 bool isBvParam(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
57  auto sort = param->getSort();
58  return sort && sort->isBv();
59 }
60 bool isFpParam(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
61  auto sort = param->getSort();
62  return sort && sort->isFp();
63 }
64 bool isStrParam(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
65  auto sort = param->getSort();
66  return sort && sort->isStr();
67 }
68 bool isRegParam(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
69  auto sort = param->getSort();
70  return sort && sort->isReg();
71 }
72 bool isArrayParam(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
73  auto sort = param->getSort();
74  return sort && sort->isArray();
75 }
76 
77 // mk operations
78 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkTrue() { return NodeManager::TRUE_NODE; }
79 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFalse() { return NodeManager::FALSE_NODE; }
80 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkUnknown() {
81  return NodeManager::UNKNOWN_NODE;
82 }
83 // mk oper
84 bool Parser::isCommutative(const NODE_KIND t) {
85  switch (t) {
86  case NODE_KIND::NT_ADD:
87  case NODE_KIND::NT_MUL:
88  case NODE_KIND::NT_AND:
89  case NODE_KIND::NT_IAND:
90  case NODE_KIND::NT_OR:
91  case NODE_KIND::NT_XOR:
92  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ADD:
93  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_MUL:
94  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_AND:
95  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_OR:
96  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_XOR:
97  case NODE_KIND::NT_EQ:
98  case NODE_KIND::NT_DISTINCT:
99  case NODE_KIND::NT_MAX:
100  case NODE_KIND::NT_MIN:
101  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NAND:
102  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NOR:
103  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_COMP:
104  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SADDO:
105  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UADDO:
106  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UMULO:
107  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_XNOR:
108  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_EQ:
109  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MAX:
110  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MIN:
111 
112  case NODE_KIND::NT_FORALL:
113  case NODE_KIND::NT_EXISTS:
114  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ADD:
115  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MUL:
116  // case NODE_KIND::NT_SUB:
117  // case NODE_KIND::NT_DIV_REAL:
118  return true;
119  default:
120  return false;
121  }
122 }
123 
124 bool canExempt(std::shared_ptr<Sort> l, std::shared_ptr<Sort> r) {
125  if ((l->isInt() || l->isReal()) && (r->isInt() || r->isReal())) {
126  return true;
127  }
128  return false;
129 }
130 std::shared_ptr<Sort>
131 Parser::getSort(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
132  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = nullptr;
133  // use the maximum sort only for int/real
134  bool is_int_real_sort = params[0]->getSort()->isInt() ||
135  params[0]->getSort()->isReal() ||
136  params[0]->getSort()->isIntOrReal();
137  if (is_int_real_sort) {
138  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
139  if (params[i]->getSort()->isReal()) {
140  sort = SortManager::REAL_SORT;
141  break;
142  }
143  }
144  if (sort == nullptr) {
145  sort = SortManager::INT_SORT;
146  }
147  }
148  else {
149  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
150  if (!params[i]->isConst()) {
151  sort = params[i]->getSort();
152  break;
153  }
154  }
155  }
156  // all constant -> nullptr
157  return sort;
158 }
159 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::getSort(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
160  return param->getSort();
161 }
162 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::getSort(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
163  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
164  return getSort({l, r});
165 }
166 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::getSort(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
167  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
168  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> m) {
169  return getSort({l, r, m});
170 }
171 
172 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>>
173 Parser::sortParams(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &p) {
174  // fast path
175  if (p.size() <= 1) {
176  return p;
177  }
178 
179  // large case
180  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> params = p;
181 
182  // pre-compute hash code
183  std::vector<std::pair<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>, size_t>> params_with_hash;
184  params_with_hash.reserve(params.size());
185 
186  for (const auto &param : params) {
187  params_with_hash.emplace_back(param, param->hashCode());
188  }
189 
190  // sort by hash code
191  std::sort(params_with_hash.begin(), params_with_hash.end(), [](const std::pair<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>, size_t> &a, const std::pair<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>, size_t> &b) {
192  if (a.second != b.second)
193  return a.second < b.second;
194  else
195  return a.first < b.first;
196  });
197 
198  // extract sorted nodes
199  for (size_t i = 0; i < params_with_hash.size(); i++) {
200  params[i] = params_with_hash[i].first;
201  }
202 
203  return params;
204 }
205 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkOper(const std::shared_ptr<Sort> &sort,
206  const NODE_KIND &t,
207  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> p) {
208  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> params;
209  params.emplace_back(p);
210  return mkOper(sort, t, params);
211 }
212 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkOper(const std::shared_ptr<Sort> &sort,
213  const NODE_KIND &t,
214  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
215  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
216  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> params;
217  params.emplace_back(l);
218  params.emplace_back(r);
219  return mkOper(sort, t, params);
220 }
221 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkOper(const std::shared_ptr<Sort> &sort,
222  const NODE_KIND &t,
223  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
224  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> m,
225  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
226  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> params;
227  params.emplace_back(l);
228  params.emplace_back(m);
229  params.emplace_back(r);
230  return mkOper(sort, t, params);
231 }
232 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
233 Parser::mkOper(const std::shared_ptr<Sort> &sort, const NODE_KIND &t, const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &p) {
234  // std::cout << "Creating operation: " << kindToString(t) << std::endl;
235  if (p.size() == 0) {
236  // std::cout << kindToString(t) << std::endl;
237  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "No parameters for operation", line_number);
238 
239  return mkUnknown();
240  }
241  else if (t == NODE_KIND::NT_FORALL || t == NODE_KIND::NT_EXISTS) {
242  static size_t quant_counter = 0;
243  quant_counter++;
244  for (size_t i = 1, isz = p.size(); i < isz; i++) {
245  p.at(i)->setName("Q" + std::to_string(quant_counter) + "-" +
246  std::to_string(i - 1));
247  }
248  }
249 
250  NODE_KIND kind = t;
251  switch (t) {
252  case NODE_KIND::NT_GE:
253  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_LE;
254  break;
255  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_GE:
256  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_FP_LE;
257  break;
258  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_GE:
259  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_STR_LE;
260  break;
261  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UGE:
262  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ULE;
263  break;
264  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SGE:
265  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SLE;
266  break;
267  case NODE_KIND::NT_GT:
268  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_LT;
269  break;
270  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_GT:
271  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_FP_LT;
272  break;
273  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_GT:
274  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_STR_LT;
275  break;
276  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UGT:
277  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ULT;
278  break;
279  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SGT:
280  kind = NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SLT;
281  break;
282 
283  default:
284  return mkInternalOper(sort, t, p);
285  }
286  // std::cout << "Warning: converting " << kindToString(t) << " to " <<
287  // kindToString(kind) << " at line " << line_number << std::endl; std::cout <<
288  // p.size() << std::endl;
289  auto np = p;
290  std::reverse(np.begin(), np.end());
291  return mkInternalOper(sort, kind, np);
292 }
293 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
294 Parser::mkInternalOper(const std::shared_ptr<Sort> &sort, const NODE_KIND &t, const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &p) {
295  // std::cout << "Creating operation: " << kindToString(t) << std::endl;
296  // make the params unique
297  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> params(p);
298  for (auto &child : params) {
299  if (child->isFuncDef()) {
300  // Found a function definition or declaration, apply it with parameters
301  if (child->getChildrenSize() != 1) {
302  throw std::runtime_error("Error: function " + child->getName() + " is not fully defined.");
303  }
304  child = child->getFuncBody();
305  }
306  }
307  auto nt = t;
308  auto result = rewrite_oper(nt, params);
309  // auto result = nullptr;
310  if (result != nullptr)
311  return result;
312 
313  if (isCommutative(t)) {
314  switch (t) {
315  case NODE_KIND::NT_FORALL:
316  case NODE_KIND::NT_EXISTS:
317  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ADD:
318  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MUL: {
319  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> nparams(params.begin() + 1,
320  params.end());
321  nparams = sortParams(nparams);
322  nparams.insert(nparams.begin(), params[0]);
323  params = nparams;
324  break;
325  }
326  default:
327  params = sortParams(params);
328  break;
329  }
330  }
331  // if (t == NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NOT) {
332  // std::cout << p.at(0)->toString() << ' ' <<
333  // p.at(0)->getChild(0)->getSort()->toString() << std::endl;
334  // }
335  // auto result = nullptr;
336  // std::cout << kindToString(nt) << ' ' << static_cast<size_t>(nt) << ' ' <<
337  // params.size() << std::endl;
338  if (result != nullptr)
339  return result;
340  else
341  return node_manager->createNode(sort, nt, kindToString(nt), params);
342 }
343 
344 // mk function
345 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
346 Parser::mkFuncDec(const std::string &name,
347  const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<Sort>> &params,
348  std::shared_ptr<Sort> out_sort) {
349  if (fun_key_map.find(name) != fun_key_map.end()) {
350  // // multiple declarations
351  // err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_MUL_DECL, "Multiple declarations of function",
352  // line_number); return mkUnknown();
353  fun_dup_count_map[name]++;
354  std::string new_name =
355  name + "_dup_" + std::to_string(fun_dup_count_map[name]);
356  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children;
357  for (auto &param : params) {
358  // TODO, a random name and not record it.
359  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param_node = node_manager->createNode(
360  param, NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_PARAM, param->toString());
361  children.emplace_back(param_node);
362  }
363  // add a NodeManager::NULL_NODE to represent the function body.
364  children.insert(children.begin(), NodeManager::NULL_NODE);
365 
366  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> func = node_manager->createNode(
367  out_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_DEC, new_name, children);
368 
369  fun_key_map.insert(std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>>(
370  new_name, fun_key_map.at(name)));
371  fun_key_map.at(name) = func;
372  return func;
373  }
374  else {
375  // create a new function
376  // children: params
377  // out_sort: return sort
378  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children;
379  for (auto &param : params) {
380  // TODO, a random name and not record it.
381  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param_node = node_manager->createNode(
382  param, NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_PARAM, param->toString());
383  children.emplace_back(param_node);
384  }
385  // add a NodeManager::NULL_NODE to represent the function body.
386  children.insert(children.begin(), NodeManager::NULL_NODE);
387 
388  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> func = node_manager->createNode(
389  out_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_DEC, name, children);
390  fun_key_map.insert(
391  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>>(name, func));
392  return func;
393  }
394 }
395 
396 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
397 Parser::mkFuncDef(const std::string &name,
398  const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params,
399  std::shared_ptr<Sort> out_sort,
400  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> body) {
401  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> func = nullptr;
402  if (fun_key_map.find(name) != fun_key_map.end()) {
403  func = fun_key_map[name];
404  condAssert(func->getKind() == NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_DEC,
405  "mkFuncDef: func is not a function declaration");
406  // NOTE: we still check it, even if it is not necessary.
407  if (func->getKind() == NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_DEC) {
408  // update the function
409  func = fun_key_map[name];
410  func->updateFuncDef(out_sort, body, params);
411  return func;
412  }
413  else {
414  // multiple definitions
415  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_MUL_DEF, "Multiple definitions of function", line_number);
416  return mkUnknown();
417  }
418  }
419  else {
420  // create a new function
421  // children: params
422  // out_sort: return sort
423  // body: function body
424  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children;
425  children.emplace_back(body);
426  for (auto &param : params) {
427  children.emplace_back(param);
428  }
429  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> func = node_manager->createNode(
430  out_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_DEF, name, children);
431  fun_key_map.insert(
432  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>>(name, func));
433  return func;
434  }
435 }
436 
437 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
438 Parser::mkFuncRec(const std::string &name,
439  const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params,
440  std::shared_ptr<Sort> out_sort,
441  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> body) {
442  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> func = nullptr;
443  if (fun_key_map.find(name) != fun_key_map.end()) {
444  func = fun_key_map[name];
445  condAssert(func->getKind() == NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_DEC,
446  "mkFuncRec: func is not a function declaration");
447  // NOTE: we still check it, even if it is not necessary.
448  if (func->getKind() == NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_DEC) {
449  // update the function to recursive function
450  func = fun_key_map[name];
451  func->updateFuncDef(out_sort, body, params, true);
452  return func;
453  }
454  else {
455  // multiple definitions
456  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_MUL_DEF,
457  "Multiple definitions of recursive function",
458  line_number);
459  return mkUnknown();
460  }
461  }
462  else {
463  // create a new recursive function
464  // children: params
465  // out_sort: return sort
466  // body: function body
467  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children;
468  children.emplace_back(body);
469  for (auto &param : params) {
470  children.emplace_back(param);
471  }
472  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> func = node_manager->createNode(
473  out_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_REC, name, children);
474  fun_key_map.insert(
475  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>>(name, func));
476  return func;
477  }
478 }
479 
480 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkSortDec(const std::string &name,
481  const size_t &arity) {
482  return sort_manager->createSortDec(name, arity);
483 }

485 std::shared_ptr<Sort>
486 Parser::mkSortDef(const std::string &name,
487  const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<Sort>> &params,
488  std::shared_ptr<Sort> out_sort) {
489  return sort_manager->createSortDef(name, params, out_sort);
490 }
491 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkIntSort() { return SortManager::INT_SORT; }
492 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkRealSort() { return SortManager::REAL_SORT; }
493 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkBoolSort() { return SortManager::BOOL_SORT; }
494 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkStrSort() { return SortManager::STR_SORT; }
495 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkRegSort() { return SortManager::REG_SORT; }
496 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkRoundingModeSort() {
497  return SortManager::ROUNDING_MODE_SORT;
498 }
499 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkNatSort() { return SortManager::NAT_SORT; }
500 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkBVSort(const size_t &width) {
501  return sort_manager->createBVSort(width);
502 }
503 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkFPSort(const size_t &e, const size_t &s) {
504  return sort_manager->createFPSort(e, s);
505 }
506 std::shared_ptr<Sort> Parser::mkArraySort(std::shared_ptr<Sort> index,
507  std::shared_ptr<Sort> elem) {
508  return sort_manager->createArraySort(index, elem);
509 }
510 
511 // CORE OPERATORS
512 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
513 Parser::mkEq(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
514  if (params.size() < 2) {
515  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for equality", line_number);
516  return mkUnknown();
517  }
518  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
519 
520  // if (params.size() == 2) {
521  // return mkEq(params[0], params[1]);
522  // }
523 
524  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
525 
526  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
527  if (sort != nullptr && !params[i]->getSort()->isEqTo(sort)) {
528  if (canExempt(params[i]->getSort(), sort)) {
529  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in eq, but now exempt for int/real"
530  << std::endl;
531  }
532  else {
533  err_all(params[i], "Type mismatch in equality", line_number);
534  return mkUnknown();
535  }
536  }
537  if (params[i]->isTrue()) {
538  // x = true => x
539  continue;
540  }
541  else {
542  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
543  }
544  }
545 
546  if (new_params.size() == 0) {
547  // all true constant
548  return mkTrue();
549  }
550  else if (new_params.size() == 1) {
551  // only one uncertain param
552  return new_params[0];
553  }
554  else {
555  // if (new_params.size() > 100) {
556  // // [OPTIMIZE] have not use mkOper, because it will sort parameters
557  // return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::BOOL_SORT,
558  // NODE_KIND::NT_EQ, "eq", new_params);
559  // }
560  // else {
561  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_EQ, new_params);
562  // }
563  }
564 }
565 
566 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
567 Parser::mkDistinct(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
568  if (params.size() < 2) {
569  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for distinct", line_number);
570  return mkUnknown();
571  }
572  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
573 
574  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
575 
576  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
577  if (params[i]->isErr())
578  return params[i];
579  if (sort != nullptr && !params[i]->getSort()->isEqTo(sort)) {
580  if (canExempt(params[i]->getSort(), sort)) {
581  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in distinct, but now exempt for int/real"
582  << std::endl;
583  }
584  else {
585  err_all(params[i], "Type mismatch in distinct", line_number);
586  return mkUnknown();
587  }
588  }
589  if (params[i]->isFalse()) {
590  // x != False => x
591  continue;
592  }
593  else {
594  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
595  }
596  }
597 
598  if (new_params.size() == 0) {
599  // all false constant
600  return mkFalse();
601  }
602  else if (new_params.size() == 1) {
603  // only one uncertain param
604  return new_params[0];
605  }
606  else {
607  // // for large distinct, create node directly without sorting parameters
608  // // the semantics of distinct does not depend on the order of parameters,
609  // and sorting is too expensive if (new_params.size() > 100) {
610  // // [OPTIMIZE] have not use mkOper, because it will sort parameters
611  // return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::BOOL_SORT,
612  // NODE_KIND::NT_DISTINCT, "distinct", new_params);
613  // }
614  // else {
615  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_DISTINCT, new_params);
616  // }
617  }
618 }
619 // CONST
620 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::declareVar(const std::string &name,
621  const std::string &sort) {
622  return mkVar(sort_key_map[sort], name);
623 }
624 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::declareVar(const std::string &name,
625  const std::shared_ptr<Sort> &sort) {
626  return mkVar(sort, name);
627 }
628 
629 // LET
630 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
631 Parser::mkLetBindVar(const std::string &name,
632  const std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> &expr) {
633  if (preserving_let_key_map.find(name) != preserving_let_key_map.end()) {
634  // multiple declarations
635  return preserving_let_key_map[name];
636  }
637  else {
638  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children;
639  children.emplace_back(expr);
640  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> new_var = node_manager->createNode(
641  expr->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_LET_BIND_VAR, name, children);
642  preserving_let_key_map.insert(
643  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>>(name, new_var));
644  return new_var;
645  }
646 }
647 
648 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkLetBindVarList(
649  const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &bind_vars) {
650  // empty is allowed
651 
652  // Use the sort of the first binding variable for the list
653  std::shared_ptr<Sort> list_sort = bind_vars[0]->getSort();
654  return node_manager->createNode(list_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_LET_BIND_VAR_LIST, "", bind_vars);
655 }
656 
657 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
658 Parser::mkLetChain(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &bind_var_lists,
659  const std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> &body) {
660  if (!body) {
661  return mkErr(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_UNKWN_SYM);
662  }
663 
664  // Create children: [bind_var_lists..., body]
665  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children;
666  for (const auto &list : bind_var_lists) {
667  children.emplace_back(list);
668  }
669  children.emplace_back(body);
670 
671  return node_manager->createNode(body->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_LET_CHAIN, "", children);
672 }
673 
674 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstInt(const Integer &v) {
675  std::string v_str = ConversionUtils::toString(v);
676  return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::INTOREAL_SORT,
677  NODE_KIND::NT_CONST,
678  v_str);
679 }
680 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstInt(const std::string &v) {
681  return mkConstInt(Integer(v));
682 }
683 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstInt(const int &v) {
684  return mkConstInt(Integer(v));
685 }
686 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstInt(const Number &v) {
687  return mkConstInt(v.toInteger());
688 }
689 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstReal(const std::string &v) {
690  condAssert(TypeChecker::isReal(v) || v == "e" || v == "pi",
691  "mkConstReal: invalid real constant");
692  if (v == "e")
693  return NodeManager::E_NODE;
694  if (v == "pi")
695  return NodeManager::PI_NODE;
696  return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, v);
697 }
698 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstReal(const Real &v) {
699  std::string v_str = ConversionUtils::toString(v);
700  return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, v_str);
701 }
702 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstReal(const double &v) {
703  std::string v_str = std::to_string(v);
704  return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, v_str);
705 }
706 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstReal(const Integer &v) {
707  std::string v_str = ConversionUtils::toString(v);
708  return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, v_str);
709 }
710 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstReal(const Number &v) {
711  return mkConstReal(v.toReal());
712 }
713 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstStr(const std::string &v) {
714  // process the escape characters in the string
715  std::string processed_v = v;
716 
717  // if the string is quoted, remove the quotes
718  if (v.length() >= 2 && v[0] == '"' && v[v.length() - 1] == '"') {
719  processed_v = ConversionUtils::unescapeString(v.substr(1, v.length() - 2));
720  processed_v = "\"" + ConversionUtils::escapeString(processed_v) + "\"";
721  }
722  else
723  processed_v = "\"" + ConversionUtils::escapeString(processed_v) + "\"";
724 
725  return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::STR_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, processed_v);
726 }
727 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstBv(const std::string &v,
728  const size_t &width) {
729  std::string sort_key_name = "BV_" + std::to_string(width);
730  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = nullptr;
731  if (sort_key_map.find(sort_key_name) == sort_key_map.end()) {
732  sort = sort_manager->createBVSort(width);
733  sort_key_map.insert(
734  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<Sort>>(sort_key_name, sort));
735  }
736  else {
737  sort = sort_key_map[sort_key_name];
738  }
739  std::string bv_v = BitVectorUtils::natToBv(v, width);
740  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, bv_v);
741 }
742 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstFp(const std::string &v,
743  const size_t &e,
744  const size_t &s) {
745  std::string sort_key_name =
746  "FP_" + std::to_string(e) + "_" + std::to_string(s);
747  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = nullptr;
748  if (sort_key_map.find(sort_key_name) == sort_key_map.end()) {
749  sort = sort_manager->createFPSort(e, s);
750  sort_key_map.insert(
751  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<Sort>>(sort_key_name, sort));
752  }
753  else {
754  sort = sort_key_map[sort_key_name];
755  }
756  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, v);
757 }
758 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstFP(const std::string &fp_expr) {
759  return node_manager->createNode(nullptr, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, fp_expr);
760 }
761 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstReg(const std::string &v) {
762  return node_manager->createNode(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, v);
763 }
764 
765 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRoundingMode(const std::string &mode) {
766  // Create a special sort for rounding mode
767  std::shared_ptr<Sort> rounding_mode_sort = SortManager::ROUNDING_MODE_SORT;
768  return node_manager->createNode(rounding_mode_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, mode);
769 }
770 
771 // VAR
772 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkTempVar(const std::shared_ptr<Sort> &sort) {
773  std::string temp_var_name = "temp_" + std::to_string(temp_var_counter++);
774  if (temp_var_names.find(temp_var_name) != temp_var_names.end()) {
775  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Temp variable name already exists", line_number);
776  return mkUnknown();
777  }
778  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> newvar =
779  node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_TEMP_VAR, temp_var_name);
780  temp_var_names.insert(std::pair<std::string, size_t>(
781  temp_var_name, node_manager->getIndex(newvar)));
782  return newvar;
783 }
784 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVar(const std::shared_ptr<Sort> &sort,
785  const std::string &name) {
786  if (var_names.find(name) != var_names.end()) {
787  // multiple declarations
788  return node_manager->getNode(var_names[name]);
789  }
790  else {
791  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> newvar =
792  node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_VAR, name);
793  var_names.insert(
794  std::pair<std::string, size_t>(name, node_manager->getIndex(newvar)));
795  return newvar;
796  }
797 }
798 
799 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkPlaceholderVar(const std::string &name) {
800  if (placeholder_var_names.find(name) != placeholder_var_names.end()) {
801  // placeholder variable already exists
802  return node_manager->getNode(placeholder_var_names[name]);
803  }
804  else {
805  // Create new placeholder variable with the specified sort
806  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort =
807  placeholder_var_sort ? placeholder_var_sort : SortManager::REAL_SORT;
808  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> newvar =
809  node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_PLACEHOLDER_VAR, name);
810  condAssert(newvar->isPlaceholderVar(),
811  "Created placeholder variable is not a placeholder variable");
812  placeholder_var_names.insert(
813  std::pair<std::string, size_t>(name, node_manager->getIndex(newvar)));
814  return newvar;
815  }
816 }
817 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVarBool(const std::string &name) {
818  return mkVar(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, name);
819 }
820 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVarInt(const std::string &name) {
821  return mkVar(SortManager::INT_SORT, name);
822 }
823 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVarReal(const std::string &name) {
824  return mkVar(SortManager::REAL_SORT, name);
825 }
826 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVarBv(const std::string &name,
827  const size_t &width) {
828  std::string sort_key_name = "BV_" + std::to_string(width);
829  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = nullptr;
830  if (sort_key_map.find(sort_key_name) == sort_key_map.end()) {
831  sort = sort_manager->createBVSort(width);
832  sort_key_map.insert(
833  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<Sort>>(sort_key_name, sort));
834  }
835  else {
836  sort = sort_key_map[sort_key_name];
837  }
838  return mkVar(sort, name);
839 }
840 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVarFp(const std::string &name,
841  const size_t &e,
842  const size_t &s) {
843  std::string sort_key_name =
844  "FP_" + std::to_string(e) + "_" + std::to_string(s);
845  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = nullptr;
846  if (sort_key_map.find(sort_key_name) == sort_key_map.end()) {
847  sort = sort_manager->createFPSort(e, s);
848  sort_key_map.insert(
849  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<Sort>>(sort_key_name, sort));
850  }
851  else {
852  sort = sort_key_map[sort_key_name];
853  }
854  return mkVar(sort, name);
855 }
856 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVarStr(const std::string &name) {
857  return mkVar(SortManager::STR_SORT, name);
858 }
859 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVarReg(const std::string &name) {
860  return mkVar(SortManager::REG_SORT, name);
861 }
862 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkVarRoundingMode(const std::string &name) {
863  // Create a special sort for rounding mode
864  std::shared_ptr<Sort> rounding_mode_sort =
865  std::make_shared<Sort>(SORT_KIND::SK_ROUNDING_MODE, "RoundingMode", 0);
866  return mkVar(rounding_mode_sort, name);
867 }
868 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFunParamVar(std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort,
869  const std::string &name) {
870  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> newvar =
871  node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FUNC_PARAM, name);
872  // do not insert into variables
873  // it is a function parameter
874  return newvar;
875 }
876 // ARRAY
877 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkArray(const std::string &name,
878  std::shared_ptr<Sort> index,
879  std::shared_ptr<Sort> elem) {
880  std::string sort_key_name =
881  "ARRAY_" + index->toString() + "_" + elem->toString();
882  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = nullptr;
883  if (sort_key_map.find(sort_key_name) == sort_key_map.end()) {
884  sort = sort_manager->createArraySort(index, elem);
885  sort_key_map.insert(
886  std::pair<std::string, std::shared_ptr<Sort>>(sort_key_name, sort));
887  }
888  else {
889  sort = sort_key_map[sort_key_name];
890  }
891  return mkVar(sort, name);
892 }
893 
894 /*
895 (as const T) value, return Array
896 Creates a constant array where all elements have the same value
897 */
898 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkConstArray(std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort,
899  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> value) {
900  if (!sort->isArray()) {
901  err_all(value, "ConstArray on non-array sort", line_number);
902  return mkUnknown();
903  }
904 
905  // Check if value type matches array element type
906  std::shared_ptr<Sort> elem_sort = sort->getElemSort();
907  std::shared_ptr<Sort> value_sort = value->getSort();
908 
909  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST_ARRAY, "const_array", {value});
910 }
911 
912 // BOOLEAN
913 /*
914 (not Bool), return Bool
915 */
916 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkNot(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
917  if (!isBoolParam(param)) {
918  err_all(param, "Negation on non-boolean", line_number);
919  return mkUnknown();
920  }
921  else {
922  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_NOT, param);
923  }
924 }
925 
926 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
927 Parser::mkAnd(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
928  if (params.size() == 0) {
929  std::cerr << "AND on empty parameters, return true" << std::endl;
930  return mkTrue();
931  }
932  else if (params.size() == 1) {
933  return params[0];
934  }
935 
936  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
937 
938  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
939  if (!isBoolParam(params[i])) {
940  err_type_mis("AND on non-boolean", line_number);
941  return mkUnknown();
942  }
943  if (params[i]->isErr()) {
944  return params[i];
945  }
946  else if (params[i]->isTrue()) {
947  // true constant
948  continue;
949  }
950  else if (params[i]->isFalse()) {
951  // false constant
952  return mkFalse();
953  }
954  else {
955  // insert uncertain param
956  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
957  }
958  }
959 
960  if (new_params.size() == 0) {
961  // all true constant
962  return mkTrue();
963  }
964  else if (new_params.size() == 1) {
965  // only one uncertain param
966  return new_params[0];
967  }
968  else {
969  // make new AND operator
970  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_AND, new_params);
971  }
972 }
973 
974 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
975 Parser::mkOr(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
976  if (params.size() == 0) {
977  std::cerr << "OR on empty parameters, return false" << std::endl;
978  return mkFalse();
979  }
980  else if (params.size() == 1) {
981  return params[0];
982  }
983 
984  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
985 
986  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
987  if (!isBoolParam(params[i])) {
988  err_type_mis("OR on non-boolean", line_number);
989  return mkUnknown();
990  }
991  if (params[i]->isErr()) {
992  return params[i];
993  }
994  else if (params[i]->isFalse()) {
995  // false constant
996  continue;
997  }
998  else if (params[i]->isTrue()) {
999  // true constant
1000  return mkTrue();
1001  }
1002  else {
1003  // insert uncertain param
1004  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1005  }
1006  }
1007 
1008  if (new_params.size() == 0) {
1009  // all false constant
1010  return mkFalse();
1011  }
1012  else if (new_params.size() == 1) {
1013  // only one uncertain param
1014  return new_params[0];
1015  }
1016  else {
1017  // make new OR operator
1018  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_OR, new_params);
1019  }
1020 }
1021 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1022 Parser::mkImplies(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1023  if (params.size() < 2) {
1024  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for implies", line_number);
1025  return mkUnknown();
1026  }
1027 
1028  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
1029  // (=> a b c d) <=> (or -a -b -c d)
1030  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size() - 1; i++) {
1031  if (params[i]->isErr())
1032  return params[i];
1033  if (params[i]->isFalse()) {
1034  // -params[i] => true
1035  return mkTrue();
1036  }
1037  else if (params[i]->isTrue()) {
1038  continue;
1039  }
1040  else {
1041  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1042  }
1043  }
1044 
1045  if (params.back()->isErr())
1046  return params.back();
1047 
1048  if (new_params.size() == 0) {
1049  // all true constant
1050  // true -> params.back() => params.back()
1051  return params.back();
1052  }
1053 
1054  new_params.emplace_back(params.back());
1055 
1056  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_IMPLIES, new_params);
1057 }
1058 
1059 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1060 Parser::mkXor(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1061  if (params.size() == 0) {
1062  std::cerr << "XOR on empty parameters, return false" << std::endl;
1063  return mkFalse();
1064  }
1065  else if (params.size() == 1) {
1066  return params[0];
1067  }
1068 
1069  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
1070  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
1071  if (params[i]->isErr())
1072  return params[i];
1073  if (params[i]->isFalse()) {
1074  // x xor false = x
1075  continue;
1076  }
1077  else {
1078  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1079  }
1080  }
1081 
1082  if (new_params.size() == 0) {
1083  // all false constant
1084  return mkFalse();
1085  }
1086  else if (new_params.size() == 1) {
1087  // only one uncertain param
1088  return new_params[0];
1089  }
1090  else {
1091  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_XOR, new_params);
1092  }
1093 }
1094 /*
1095 (ite Bool A A), return A
1096 */
1097 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkIte(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> cond,
1098  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
1099  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
1100  if (cond->isErr())
1101  return cond;
1102  if (l->isErr())
1103  return l;
1104  if (r->isErr())
1105  return r;
1106  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_ITE, cond, l, r);
1107 }
1108 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1109 Parser::mkIte(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1110  if (params.size() != 3) {
1111  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for ite", line_number);
1112  return mkUnknown();
1113  }
1114 
1115  return mkIte(params[0], params[1], params[2]);
1116 }
1117 // ARITHMATIC COMMON OPERATORS
1118 
1119 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1120 Parser::mkAdd(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1121  if (params.size() == 0) {
1122  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for add", line_number);
1123  return mkUnknown();
1124  }
1125  else if (params.size() == 1) {
1126  return params[0];
1127  }
1128  condAssert(params.size() >= 2, "mkAdd: params has less than 2 elements");
1129  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
1130 
1131  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
1132 
1133  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
1134  if (params[i]->isErr())
1135  return params[i];
1136  if (sort != nullptr && !params[i]->getSort()->isEqTo(sort)) {
1137  if (canExempt(params[i]->getSort(), sort)) {
1138  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in add, but now exempt for int/real"
1139  << std::endl;
1140  }
1141  else {
1142  err_all(params[i], "Type mismatch in add", line_number);
1143  return mkUnknown();
1144  }
1145  }
1146  if (isZero(params[i])) {
1147  continue;
1148  }
1149  else {
1150  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1151  }
1152  }
1153 
1154  // checking
1155  if (new_params.size() == 0) {
1156  // all 0 constant
1157  if (options->isRealTheory()) {
1158  return mkConstReal(0.0);
1159  }
1160  else if (options->isIntTheory()) {
1161  return mkConstInt(0);
1162  }
1163  else {
1164  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in add", line_number);
1165  return mkUnknown();
1166  }
1167  }
1168  else if (new_params.size() == 1) {
1169  // only one uncertain param
1170  return new_params[0];
1171  }
1172  else {
1173  if (sort == nullptr) {
1174  if (options->isRealTheory()) {
1175  sort = SortManager::REAL_SORT;
1176  }
1177  else if (options->isIntTheory()) {
1178  sort = SortManager::INT_SORT;
1179  }
1180  else {
1181  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in add", line_number);
1182  return mkUnknown();
1183  }
1184  }
1185  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_ADD, new_params);
1186  }
1187 }
1188 
1189 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1190 Parser::mkMul(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1191  if (params.size() == 1) {
1192  return params[0];
1193  }
1194  condAssert(params.size() >= 2, "mkMul: params has less than 2 elements");
1195  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
1196 
1197  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
1198 
1199  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
1200  if (params[i]->isErr())
1201  return params[i];
1202  if (sort != nullptr && !params[i]->getSort()->isEqTo(sort)) {
1203  if (canExempt(params[i]->getSort(), sort)) {
1204  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in mul, but now exempt for int/real"
1205  << std::endl;
1206  }
1207  else {
1208  err_all(params[i], "Type mismatch in mul", line_number);
1209  return mkUnknown();
1210  }
1211  }
1212  if (isZero(params[i])) {
1213  if (options->isIntTheory()) {
1214  return mkConstInt(0);
1215  }
1216  else if (options->isRealTheory()) {
1217  return mkConstReal(0.0);
1218  }
1219  }
1220  else if (isOne(params[i])) {
1221  continue;
1222  }
1223  else {
1224  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1225  }
1226  }
1227 
1228  if (new_params.size() == 0) {
1229  // all 1 constant
1230  if (options->isIntTheory()) {
1231  return mkConstInt(1);
1232  }
1233  else if (options->isRealTheory()) {
1234  return mkConstReal(1.0);
1235  }
1236  else {
1237  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in mul", line_number);
1238  return mkUnknown();
1239  }
1240  }
1241  else if (new_params.size() == 1) {
1242  // only one uncertain param
1243  return new_params[0];
1244  }
1245  else {
1246  if (sort == nullptr) {
1247  if (options->isRealTheory()) {
1248  sort = SortManager::REAL_SORT;
1249  }
1250  else if (options->isIntTheory()) {
1251  sort = SortManager::INT_SORT;
1252  }
1253  else {
1254  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in mul", line_number);
1255  return mkUnknown();
1256  }
1257  }
1258  if (new_params.size() == 2) {
1259  if (new_params[0]->isCInt() && new_params[1]->isCInt()) {
1260  return mkConstInt(toInt(new_params[0]) * toInt(new_params[1]));
1261  }
1262  else if (new_params[0]->isCReal() && new_params[1]->isCReal()) {
1263  return mkConstReal(toReal(new_params[0]) * toReal(new_params[1]));
1264  }
1265  }
1266  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_MUL, new_params);
1267  }
1268 }
1269 
1270 /*
1271 (iand rt rt+), return rt
1272 */
1273 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1274 Parser::mkIand(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1275  if (params.size() == 1) {
1276  return params[0];
1277  }
1278  condAssert(params.size() >= 2, "mkIand: params has less than 2 elements");
1279  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
1280 
1281  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
1282  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
1283  if (params[i]->isErr())
1284  return params[i];
1285  if (sort != nullptr && !params[i]->getSort()->isEqTo(sort)) {
1286  if (canExempt(params[i]->getSort(), sort)) {
1287  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in iand, but now exempt for int/real"
1288  << std::endl;
1289  }
1290  else {
1291  err_all(params[i], "Type mismatch in iand", line_number);
1292  return mkUnknown();
1293  }
1294  }
1295 
1296  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1297  }
1298 
1299  if (sort == nullptr) {
1300  if (options->isRealTheory()) {
1301  sort = SortManager::REAL_SORT;
1302  }
1303  else if (options->isIntTheory()) {
1304  sort = SortManager::INT_SORT;
1305  }
1306  else {
1307  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in iand", line_number);
1308  return mkUnknown();
1309  }
1310  }
1311  if (new_params.size() == 2) {
1312  if (new_params[0]->isCInt() && new_params[1]->isCInt()) {
1313  return mkConstInt(toInt(new_params[0]) & toInt(new_params[1]));
1314  }
1315  }
1316 
1317  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_IAND, new_params);
1318 }
1319 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkPow2(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1320  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_POW2, param);
1321 }
1322 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkPow(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
1323  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
1324  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_POW, l, r);
1325 }
1326 
1327 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1328 Parser::mkSub(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1329  if (params.size() == 0) {
1330  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for sub", line_number);
1331  return mkUnknown();
1332  }
1333  if (params.size() == 1) {
1334  return mkNeg(params[0]);
1335  }
1336 
1337  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
1338  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
1339  // (- a b c)
1340  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
1341  if (params[i]->isErr())
1342  return params[i];
1343  if (sort != nullptr && !params[i]->getSort()->isEqTo(sort)) {
1344  if (canExempt(params[i]->getSort(), sort)) {
1345  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in sub, but now exempt for int/real"
1346  << std::endl;
1347  }
1348  else {
1349  err_all(params[i], "Type mismatch in sub", line_number);
1350  return mkUnknown();
1351  }
1352  }
1353  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1354  }
1355  if (sort == nullptr) {
1356  if (options->isRealTheory()) {
1357  sort = SortManager::REAL_SORT;
1358  }
1359  else if (options->isIntTheory()) {
1360  sort = SortManager::INT_SORT;
1361  }
1362  else {
1363  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in sub", line_number);
1364  return mkUnknown();
1365  }
1366  }
1367  if (new_params.size() == 2) {
1368  if ((sort->isInt() || sort->isIntOrReal()) && new_params[0]->isCInt() &&
1369  new_params[1]->isCInt()) {
1370  return mkConstInt(toInt(new_params[0]) - toInt(new_params[1]));
1371  }
1372  else if (sort->isReal() && new_params[0]->isCReal() &&
1373  new_params[1]->isCReal()) {
1374  return mkConstReal(toReal(new_params[0]) - toReal(new_params[1]));
1375  }
1376  else if (isZero(new_params[0])) {
1377  return mkNeg(new_params[1]);
1378  }
1379  else if (isZero(new_params[1])) {
1380  return new_params[0];
1381  }
1382  }
1383  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_SUB, new_params);
1384 }
1385 /*
1386 (- rt), return rt
1387 */
1388 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkNeg(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1389  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_NEG, param);
1390 }
1391 
1392 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1393 Parser::mkDivInt(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1394  if (params.size() < 2) {
1395  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for div", line_number);
1396  return mkUnknown();
1397  }
1398  if (params.size() == 1) {
1399  return params[0];
1400  }
1401  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_DIV_INT, params);
1402 }
1403 
1404 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1405 Parser::mkDiv(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1406  return mkDivReal(params);
1407 }
1408 
1409 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1410 Parser::mkDivReal(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1411  if (params.size() < 2) {
1412  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for div", line_number);
1413  return mkUnknown();
1414  }
1415  if (params.size() == 1) {
1416  return params[0];
1417  }
1418  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_DIV_REAL, params);
1419 }
1420 /*
1421 (mod Int Int), return Int
1422 */
1423 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkMod(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
1424  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
1425  if (!isIntParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
1426  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in mod", line_number);
1427  return mkUnknown();
1428  }
1429  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_MOD, l, r);
1430 }
1431 /*
1432 (abs Int), return Int
1433 (abs Real), return Real
1434 */
1435 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkAbs(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1436  if (!isIntParam(param) && !isRealParam(param)) {
1437  err_all(param, "Absolute value on non-integer or non-real", line_number);
1438  return mkUnknown();
1439  }
1440  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_ABS, param);
1441 }
1442 /*
1443 (sqrt Real), return Real
1444 (sqrt Int), return Real
1445 */
1446 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkSqrt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1447  if (!isIntParam(param) && !isRealParam(param)) {
1448  err_all(param, "Square root on non-integer or non-real", line_number);
1449  return mkUnknown();
1450  }
1451  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_SQRT, param);
1452 }
1453 /*
1454 (safesqrt Real), return Real
1455 (safesqrt Int), return Real
1456 */
1457 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkSafeSqrt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1458  if (!isIntParam(param) && !isRealParam(param)) {
1459  err_all(param, "Safe square root on non-integer or non-real", line_number);
1460  return mkUnknown();
1461  }
1462  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_SAFESQRT, param);
1463 }
1464 /*
1465 (ceil Real), return Int
1466 */
1467 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkCeil(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1468  if (!isIntParam(param) && !isRealParam(param)) {
1469  err_all(param, "Ceiling on non-integer or non-real", line_number);
1470  return mkUnknown();
1471  }
1472  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_CEIL, param);
1473 }
1474 /*
1475 (floor Real), return Int
1476 */
1477 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFloor(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1478  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FLOOR, param);
1479 }
1480 /*
1481 (round Real), return Int
1482 */
1483 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRound(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1484  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_ROUND, param);
1485 }
1486 // TRANSCENDENTAL ARITHMATIC
1487 /*
1488 (exp Real), return Real
1489 */
1490 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkExp(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1491  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_EXP, param);
1492 }
1493 /*
1494 (ln Real), return Real
1495 */
1496 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkLn(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1497  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_LN, param);
1498 }
1499 /*
1500 (lb Real), return Real
1501 */
1502 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkLb(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1503  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_LB, param);
1504 }
1505 /*
1506 (lg Real), return Real
1507 */
1508 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkLg(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1509  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_LG, param);
1510 }
1511 /*
1512 (log Real Real), return Real
1513 */
1514 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkLog(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
1515  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
1516  if (!l->getSort()->isEqTo(r->getSort())) {
1517  if (canExempt(l->getSort(), r->getSort())) {
1518  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in log, but now exempt for int/real"
1519  << std::endl;
1520  }
1521  else {
1522  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in log", line_number);
1523  return mkUnknown();
1524  }
1525  }
1526  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_LOG, l, r);
1527 }
1528 /*
1529 (sin Real), return Real
1530 */
1531 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkSin(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1532  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_SIN, param);
1533 }

1535 (cos Real), return Real
1536 */
1537 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkCos(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1538  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_COS, param);
1539 }

1674 */
1675 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkAtan2(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,

1679 
1680 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1681 Parser::mkLe(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1682  if (params.size() < 2) {
1683  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for le", line_number);
1684  return mkUnknown();
1685  }
1686  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_LE, params);
1687 }
1688 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1689 Parser::mkLt(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1690  if (params.size() < 2) {
1691  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for lt", line_number);
1692  return mkUnknown();
1693  }
1694  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_LT, params);
1695 }
1696 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1697 Parser::mkGe(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1698  if (params.size() < 2) {
1699  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for ge", line_number);
1700  return mkUnknown();
1701  }
1702  // std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> nparams(params.rbegin(),
1703  // params.rend());
1704  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_GE, params);
1705 }
1706 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1707 Parser::mkGt(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1708  if (params.size() < 2) {
1709  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for gt", line_number);
1710  return mkUnknown();
1711  }
1712  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_GT, params);
1713 }
1714 // ARITHMATIC CONVERSION
1715 /*
1716 (to_int Real), return Int
1717 */
1718 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkToInt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1719  if (!isRealParam(param)) {
1720  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in to_int", line_number);
1721  return mkUnknown();
1722  }
1723  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_TO_INT, param);
1724 }
1725 /*
1726 (to_real Int), return Real
1727 */
1728 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkToReal(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1729  if (!isIntParam(param)) {
1730  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in to_real", line_number);
1731  return mkUnknown();
1732  }
1733  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_TO_REAL, param);
1734 }
1735 // ARITHMATIC PROPERTIES
1736 /*
1737 (is_int Real), return Bool
1738 */
1739 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkIsInt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1740  if (!isRealParam(param)) {
1741  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in is_int", line_number);
1742  return mkUnknown();
1743  }
1744  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_IS_INT, param);
1745 }
1746 /*
1747 (is_divisible Int Int), return Bool
1748 */
1749 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkIsDivisible(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
1750  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
1751  if (!isIntParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
1752  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in is_divisible", line_number);
1753  return mkUnknown();
1754  }
1755  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_IS_DIVISIBLE, l, r);
1756 }
1757 /*
1758 (is_prime Int), return Bool
1759 */
1760 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkIsPrime(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1761  if (!isIntParam(param)) {
1762  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in is_prime", line_number);
1763  return mkUnknown();
1764  }
1765  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_IS_PRIME, param);
1766 }
1767 /*
1768 (is_even Int), return Bool
1769 */
1770 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkIsEven(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1771  if (!isIntParam(param)) {
1772  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in is_even", line_number);
1773  return mkUnknown();
1774  }
1775  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_IS_EVEN, param);
1776 }
1777 /*
1778 (is_odd Int), return Bool
1779 */
1780 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkIsOdd(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1781  if (!isIntParam(param)) {
1782  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in is_odd", line_number);
1783  return mkUnknown();
1784  }
1785  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_IS_ODD, param);
1786 }
1787 // ARITHMATIC CONSTANTS
1788 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkPi() { return NodeManager::PI_NODE; }
1789 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkE() { return NodeManager::E_NODE; }
1790 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkInfinity(std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort) {
1791  if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::STR_SORT)) {
1792  return NodeManager::STR_INF_NODE;
1793  }
1794  else if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::INT_SORT)) {
1795  return NodeManager::INT_INF_NODE;
1796  }
1797  else if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::REAL_SORT)) {
1798  return NodeManager::REAL_INF_NODE;
1799  }
1800  else {
1801  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in infinity", line_number);
1802  return mkUnknown();
1803  }
1804 }
1805 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkPosInfinity(std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort) {
1806  if (!sort) {
1807  return NodeManager::REAL_POS_INF_NODE;
1808  }
1809  else if (sort->isFp()) {
1810  // For floating point, create a node with full name including eb and sb
1811  size_t eb = sort->getExponentWidth();
1812  size_t sb = sort->getSignificandWidth();
1813  std::string const_name =
1814  "(_ +oo " + std::to_string(eb) + " " + std::to_string(sb) + ")";
1815  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_POS_INFINITY, const_name);
1816  }
1817  else if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::STR_SORT)) {
1818  return NodeManager::STR_POS_INF_NODE;
1819  }
1820  else if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::INT_SORT)) {
1821  return NodeManager::INT_POS_INF_NODE;
1822  }
1823  else if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::REAL_SORT)) {
1824  return NodeManager::REAL_POS_INF_NODE;
1825  }
1826  else {
1827  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in pos_infinity", line_number);
1828  return mkUnknown();
1829  }
1830 }
1831 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkNegInfinity(std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort) {
1832  if (!sort) {
1833  return NodeManager::REAL_NEG_INF_NODE;
1834  }
1835  else if (sort->isFp()) {
1836  // For floating point, create a node with full name including eb and sb
1837  size_t eb = sort->getExponentWidth();
1838  size_t sb = sort->getSignificandWidth();
1839  std::string const_name =
1840  "(_ -oo " + std::to_string(eb) + " " + std::to_string(sb) + ")";
1841  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_NEG_INFINITY, const_name);
1842  }
1843  else if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::STR_SORT)) {
1844  return NodeManager::STR_NEG_INF_NODE;
1845  }
1846  else if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::INT_SORT)) {
1847  return NodeManager::INT_NEG_INF_NODE;
1848  }
1849  else if (sort->isEqTo(SortManager::REAL_SORT)) {
1850  return NodeManager::REAL_NEG_INF_NODE;
1851  }
1852  else {
1853  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in neg_infinity", line_number);
1854  return mkUnknown();
1855  }
1856 }
1857 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkNaN(std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort) {
1858  if (!sort) {
1859  return NodeManager::NAN_NODE;
1860  }
1861  else if (sort->isFp()) {
1862  // For floating point, create a node with full name including eb and sb
1863  size_t eb = sort->getExponentWidth();
1864  size_t sb = sort->getSignificandWidth();
1865  std::string const_name =
1866  "(_ NaN " + std::to_string(eb) + " " + std::to_string(sb) + ")";
1867  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_NAN, const_name);
1868  }
1869  else {
1870  return NodeManager::NAN_NODE;
1871  }
1872 }
1873 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkEpsilon() {
1874  return NodeManager::EPSILON_NODE;
1875 }
1876 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkPosEpsilon() {
1877  return NodeManager::POS_EPSILON_NODE;
1878 }
1879 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkNegEpsilon() {
1880  return NodeManager::NEG_EPSILON_NODE;
1881 }
1882 // ARITHMATIC FUNCTIONS
1883 // /*
1884 // (sum rt rt+), return rt
1885 // */
1886 // std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkSum(const
1887 // std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params); // \Sum params
1888 // std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkProd(const
1889 // std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params); // \Prod params
1890 /*
1891 (gcd Int Int), return Int
1892 */
1893 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkGcd(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
1894  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
1895  if (!isIntParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
1896  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in gcd", line_number);
1897  return mkUnknown();
1898  }
1899  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_GCD, l, r);
1900 }
1901 /*
1902 (lcm Int Int), return Int
1903 */
1904 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkLcm(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
1905  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
1906  if (!isIntParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
1907  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in lcm", line_number);
1908  return mkUnknown();
1909  }
1910  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_LCM, l, r);
1911 }
1912 /*
1913 (factorial Int), return Int
1914 */
1915 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFact(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1916  if (!isIntParam(param)) {
1917  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in factorial", line_number);
1918  return mkUnknown();
1919  }
1920  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FACT, param);
1921 }
1922 // BITVECTOR COMMON OPERATORS
1923 /*
1924 (bv_not Bv), return Bv
1925 */
1926 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvNot(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
1927  if (!isBvParam(param)) {
1928  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_not", line_number);
1929  return mkUnknown();
1930  }
1931  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NOT, param);
1932 }
1933 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1934 Parser::mkBvAnd(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1935  if (params.size() == 0) {
1936  std::cerr << "BVAND on empty parameters, return true" << std::endl;
1937  return mkTrue();
1938  }
1939  else if (params.size() == 1) {
1940  return params[0];
1941  }
1942  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
1943 
1944  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
1945 
1946  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
1947  if (params[i]->isErr())
1948  return params[i];
1949  if (sort != nullptr && !isBvParam(params[i])) {
1950  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_and", line_number);
1951  return mkUnknown();
1952  }
1953  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1954  }
1955 
1956  if (sort == nullptr) {
1957  sort = new_params[0]->getSort();
1958  }
1959 
1960  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_AND, new_params);
1961 }
1962 
1963 /*
1964 (bvor Bv Bv+), return Bv
1965 */
1966 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1967 Parser::mkBvOr(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1968  if (params.size() == 0) {
1969  std::cerr << "BVOR on empty parameters, return false" << std::endl;
1970  return mkFalse();
1971  }
1972  else if (params.size() == 1) {
1973  return params[0];
1974  }
1975  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
1976 
1977  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
1978 
1979  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
1980  if (params[i]->isErr())
1981  return params[i];
1982  if (sort != nullptr && !isBvParam(params[i])) {
1983  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_or", line_number);
1984  return mkUnknown();
1985  }
1986  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
1987  }
1988 
1989  if (sort == nullptr) {
1990  sort = new_params[0]->getSort();
1991  }
1992 
1993  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_OR, new_params);
1994 }
1995 
1996 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
1997 Parser::mkBvXor(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
1998  if (params.size() == 0) {
1999  std::cerr << "BVXOR on empty parameters, return false" << std::endl;
2000  return mkFalse();
2001  }
2002  else if (params.size() == 1) {
2003  return params[0];
2004  }
2005  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
2006 
2007  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
2008 
2009  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
2010  if (params[i]->isErr())
2011  return params[i];
2012  if (sort != nullptr && !isBvParam(params[i])) {
2013  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_xor", line_number);
2014  return mkUnknown();
2015  }
2016  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
2017  }
2018 
2019  if (sort == nullptr) {
2020  sort = new_params[0]->getSort();
2021  }
2022 
2023  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_XOR, new_params);
2024 }
2025 
2026 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvNand(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2027  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2028  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(l, r);
2029  if (sort == nullptr) {
2030  sort = l->getSort();
2031  }
2032 
2033  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NAND, l, r);
2034 }
2035 
2036 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvNor(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2037  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2038  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(l, r);
2039  if (sort == nullptr) {
2040  sort = l->getSort();
2041  }
2042 
2043  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NOR, l, r);
2044 }
2045 
2046 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2047 Parser::mkBvComp(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2048  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = sort_manager->createBVSort(1);
2049 
2050  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_COMP, params);
2051 }
2052 
2053 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvXnor(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2054  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2055  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(l, r);
2056 
2057  if (sort == nullptr) {
2058  sort = l->getSort();
2059  }
2060 
2061  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_XNOR, l, r);
2062 }
2063 
2064 /*
2065 (bvneg Bv), return Bv
2066 */
2067 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvNeg(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2068  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NEG, param);
2069 }
2070 
2071 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2072 Parser::mkBvAdd(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2073  if (params.size() == 0) {
2074  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for bv_add", line_number);
2075  return mkUnknown();
2076  }
2077  else if (params.size() == 1) {
2078  return params[0];
2079  }
2080  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
2081  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
2082 
2083  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
2084  if (params[i]->isErr())
2085  return params[i];
2086  if (sort != nullptr && !isBvParam(params[i])) {
2087  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_add", line_number);
2088  return mkUnknown();
2089  }
2090  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
2091  }
2092 
2093  if (sort == nullptr) {
2094  sort = new_params[0]->getSort();
2095  }
2096 
2097  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ADD, new_params);
2098 }
2099 
2100 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvSub(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2101  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2102  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(l, r);
2103 
2104  if (sort == nullptr) {
2105  sort = l->getSort();
2106  }
2107 
2108  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SUB, l, r);
2109 }
2110 
2111 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2112 Parser::mkBvMul(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2113  if (params.size() == 0) {
2114  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for bv_mul", line_number);
2115  return mkUnknown();
2116  }
2117  else if (params.size() == 1) {
2118  return params[0];
2119  }
2120  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
2121  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
2122  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
2123  if (params[i]->isErr())
2124  return params[i];
2125  if (sort != nullptr && !isBvParam(params[i])) {
2126  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_mul", line_number);
2127  return mkUnknown();
2128  }
2129  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
2130  }
2131 
2132  if (sort == nullptr) {
2133  sort = new_params[0]->getSort();
2134  }
2135 
2136  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_MUL, new_params);
2137 }

2139 (bvudiv Bv Bv), return Bv

2237 /*
2238 (bvconcat Bv Bv+), return Bv
2239 */
2240 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2241 Parser::mkBvConcat(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2242  if (params.size() == 0) {
2243  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for bv_concat", line_number);
2244  return mkUnknown();
2245  }
2246  else if (params.size() == 1) {
2247  return params[0];
2248  }
2249  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
2250 
2251  size_t width = 0;
2252  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
2253  if (params[i]->isErr())
2254  return params[i];
2255  // no need to check equal sort
2256  if (!isBvParam(params[i])) {
2257  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_concat", line_number);
2258  return mkUnknown();
2259  }
2260  width += params[i]->getSort()->getBitWidth();
2261  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
2262  }
2263  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort = sort_manager->createBVSort(width);
2264 
2265  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_CONCAT, new_params);
2266 }
2267 /*
2268 (bvextract Bv Int Int), return Bv
2269 */
2270 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvExtract(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2271  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
2272  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> s) {
2273  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || s->isErr())
2274  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
2275  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isIntParam(r) || !isIntParam(s)) {
2276  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_extract", line_number);
2277  return mkUnknown();
2278  }
2279  size_t width = toInt(r).toULong() - toInt(s).toULong() + 1;
2280  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort = sort_manager->createBVSort(width);
2281 
2282  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_EXTRACT, l, r, s);
2283 }
2284 /*
2285 (bvrepeat Bv Int), return Bv
2286 */
2287 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvRepeat(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2288  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2289  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
2290  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_repeat", line_number);
2291  return mkUnknown();
2292  }
2293  size_t width = l->getSort()->getBitWidth() * toInt(r).toULong();
2294  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort = sort_manager->createBVSort(width);
2295 
2296  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_REPEAT, l, r);
2297 }
2298 /*
2299 (zero_extend Bv Int), return Bv
2300 */
2301 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvZeroExt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2302  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2303  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
2304  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_zero_ext", line_number);
2305  return mkUnknown();
2306  }
2307  size_t width = toInt(r).toULong();
2308  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort =
2309  sort_manager->createBVSort(width + l->getSort()->getBitWidth());
2310  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ZERO_EXT, l, r);
2311 }
2312 /*
2313 (bvsign_extend Bv Int), return Bv
2314 */
2315 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvSignExt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2316  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2317  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
2318  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_sign_ext", line_number);
2319  return mkUnknown();
2320  }
2321  size_t width = toInt(r).toULong();
2322  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort =
2323  sort_manager->createBVSort(width + l->getSort()->getBitWidth());
2324 
2325  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SIGN_EXT, l, r);
2326 }
2327 /*
2328 (bvrotate_left Bv Int), return Bv
2329 */
2330 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvRotateLeft(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2331  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2332  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
2333  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_rotate_left", line_number);
2334  return mkUnknown();
2335  }
2336 
2337  size_t width = l->getSort()->getBitWidth();
2338  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort = sort_manager->createBVSort(width);
2339 
2340  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ROTATE_LEFT, l, r);
2341 }
2342 /*
2343 (bvrotate_right Bv Int), return Bv
2344 */
2345 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvRotateRight(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2346  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2347  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
2348  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_rotate_right", line_number);
2349  return mkUnknown();
2350  }
2351  size_t width = l->getSort()->getBitWidth();
2352  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort = sort_manager->createBVSort(width);
2353 
2354  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ROTATE_RIGHT, l, r);
2355 }
2356 // BITVECTOR COMP
2357 /*
2358 (bvult Bv Bv), return Bool
2359 */
2360 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvUlt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2361  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2362  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isBvParam(r)) {
2363  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_ult", line_number);
2364  return mkUnknown();
2365  }
2366  else if (l == r) {
2367  return mkFalse();
2368  }
2369  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ULT, l, r);
2370 }
2371 /*
2372 (bvule Bv Bv), return Bool
2373 */
2374 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvUle(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2375  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2376  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isBvParam(r)) {
2377  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_ule", line_number);
2378  return mkUnknown();
2379  }
2380 
2381  if (l->isCBV() && r->isCBV()) {
2382  return BitVectorUtils::bvComp(l->toString(), r->toString(), NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ULE)
2383  ? mkTrue()
2384  : mkFalse();
2385  }
2386  else if (l == r) {
2387  return mkTrue();
2388  }
2389 
2390  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ULE, l, r);
2391 }
2392 /*
2393 (bvugt Bv Bv), return Bool
2394 */
2395 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvUgt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2396  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2397  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isBvParam(r)) {
2398  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_ugt", line_number);
2399  return mkUnknown();
2400  }
2401 
2402  if (l->isCBV() && r->isCBV()) {
2403  return BitVectorUtils::bvComp(l->toString(), r->toString(), NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UGT)
2404  ? mkTrue()
2405  : mkFalse();
2406  }
2407  else if (l == r) {
2408  return mkFalse();
2409  }
2410 
2411  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UGT, l, r);
2412 }
2413 /*
2414 (bvuge Bv Bv), return Bool
2415 */
2416 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvUge(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2417  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2418  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isBvParam(r)) {
2419  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_uge", line_number);
2420  return mkUnknown();
2421  }
2422 
2423  if (l->isCBV() && r->isCBV()) {
2424  return BitVectorUtils::bvComp(l->toString(), r->toString(), NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UGE)
2425  ? mkTrue()
2426  : mkFalse();
2427  }
2428  else if (l == r) {
2429  return mkTrue();
2430  }
2431 
2432  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UGE, l, r);
2433 }
2434 /*
2435 (bvslt Bv Bv), return Bool
2436 */

2455 /*
2456 (bvsle Bv Bv), return Bool
2457 */
2458 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvSle(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2459  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2460  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isBvParam(r)) {

2470  else if (l == r) {

2477 (bvsgt Bv Bv), return Bool

2481  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isBvParam(r)) {

2484  }

2486  if (l->isCBV() && r->isCBV()) {

2488  ? mkTrue()
2489  : mkFalse();

2497 /*
2498 (bvsge Bv Bv), return Bool
2499 */
2500 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvSge(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2501  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2502  if (!isBvParam(l) || !isBvParam(r)) {
2503  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_sge", line_number);
2504  return mkUnknown();
2505  }
2506 
2507  if (l->isCBV() && r->isCBV()) {
2508  return BitVectorUtils::bvComp(l->toString(), r->toString(), NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SGE)
2509  ? mkTrue()
2510  : mkFalse();
2511  }
2512  else if (l == r) {
2513  return mkTrue();
2514  }
2515
