2518 // BITVECTOR CONVERSION
2519 /*
2520 (bv2nat Bv), return Nat
2521 */
2522 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvToNat(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2523  if (!isBvParam(param)) {
2524  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_to_nat", line_number);
2525  return mkUnknown();
2526  }
2527 
2528  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_TO_NAT, param);
2529 }
2530 /*
2531 (nat2bv Nat Int), return Bv
2532 */
2533 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkNatToBv(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param,
2534  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> size) {
2535  if (!isIntParam(param) || !isIntParam(size)) {
2536  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in nat_to_bv", line_number);
2537  return mkUnknown();
2538  }
2539  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort =
2540  sort_manager->createBVSort(toInt(size).toULong());
2541  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_NAT_TO_BV, param, size);
2542 }
2543 /*
2544 (bv2int Bv), return Int
2545 */
2546 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkBvToInt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2547  if (!isBvParam(param)) {
2548  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in bv_to_int", line_number);
2549  return mkUnknown();
2550  }
2551  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_BV_TO_INT, param);
2552 }
2553 
2554 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkUbvToInt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2555  if (!isBvParam(param)) {
2556  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in ubv_to_int", line_number);
2557  return mkUnknown();
2558  }
2559  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_UBV_TO_INT, param);
2560 }
2561 
2562 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkSbvToInt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2563  if (!isBvParam(param)) {
2564  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in sbv_to_int", line_number);
2565  return mkUnknown();
2566  }
2567  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_SBV_TO_INT, param);
2568 }
2569 /*
2570 (int2bv Int Int), return Bv
2571 */
2572 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkIntToBv(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param,
2573  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> size) {
2574  if (!isIntParam(param) || !isIntParam(size)) {
2575  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in int_to_bv", line_number);
2576  return mkUnknown();
2577  }
2578  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort =
2579  sort_manager->createBVSort(toInt(size).toULong());
2580  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_INT_TO_BV, param, size);
2581 }
2582 
2583 // FLOATING POINT COMMON OPERATORS
2584 /*
2585 (fp.add RoundingMode FloatingPoint FloatingPoint), return FloatingPoint
2586 */
2587 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2588 Parser::mkFpAdd(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2589  if (params.size() != 3) {
2590  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS,
2591  "fp.add requires exactly 3 parameters: RoundingMode, "
2592  "FloatingPoint, FloatingPoint",
2593  line_number);
2594  return mkUnknown();
2595  }
2596 
2597  if (params[0]->isErr() || params[1]->isErr() || params[2]->isErr()) {
2598  return params[0]->isErr() ? params[0]
2599  : (params[1]->isErr() ? params[1] : params[2]);
2600  }
2601 
2602  if (!params[0]->getSort()->isRoundingMode()) {
2603  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2604  "First parameter of fp.add must be a rounding mode",
2605  line_number);
2606  return mkUnknown();
2607  }
2608 
2609  if (!isFpParam(params[1]) || !isFpParam(params[2])) {
2610  err_all(
2611  ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2612  "Second and third parameters of fp.add must be floating point numbers",
2613  line_number);
2614  return mkUnknown();
2615  }
2616 
2617  std::shared_ptr<Sort> result_sort = params[1]->getSort();
2618  if (!(*result_sort == *params[2]->getSort())) {
2619  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2620  "Floating point operands must have the same sort",
2621  line_number);
2622  return mkUnknown();
2623  }
2624 
2625  return mkOper(result_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ADD, params);
2626 }
2627 /*
2628 (fp.sub RoundingMode FloatingPoint FloatingPoint), return FloatingPoint
2629 */
2630 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2631 Parser::mkFpSub(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2632  if (params.size() != 3) {
2633  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS,
2634  "fp.sub requires exactly 3 parameters: RoundingMode, "
2635  "FloatingPoint, FloatingPoint",
2636  line_number);
2637  return mkUnknown();
2638  }
2639 
2640  if (params[0]->isErr() || params[1]->isErr() || params[2]->isErr()) {
2641  return params[0]->isErr() ? params[0]
2642  : (params[1]->isErr() ? params[1] : params[2]);
2643  }
2644 
2645  if (!params[0]->getSort()->isRoundingMode()) {
2646  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2647  "First parameter of fp.sub must be a rounding mode",
2648  line_number);
2649  return mkUnknown();
2650  }
2651 
2652  if (!isFpParam(params[1]) || !isFpParam(params[2])) {
2653  err_all(
2654  ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2655  "Second and third parameters of fp.sub must be floating point numbers",
2656  line_number);
2657  return mkUnknown();
2658  }
2659 
2660  std::shared_ptr<Sort> result_sort = params[1]->getSort();
2661  if (!(*result_sort == *params[2]->getSort())) {
2662  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2663  "Floating point operands must have the same sort",
2664  line_number);
2665  return mkUnknown();
2666  }
2667 
2668  return mkOper(result_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_SUB, params);
2669 }
2670 /*
2671 (fp.mul RoundingMode FloatingPoint FloatingPoint), return FloatingPoint
2672 */
2673 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2674 Parser::mkFpMul(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2675  if (params.size() != 3) {
2676  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS,
2677  "fp.mul requires exactly 3 parameters: RoundingMode, "
2678  "FloatingPoint, FloatingPoint",
2679  line_number);
2680  return mkUnknown();
2681  }
2682 
2683  if (params[0]->isErr() || params[1]->isErr() || params[2]->isErr()) {
2684  return params[0]->isErr() ? params[0]
2685  : (params[1]->isErr() ? params[1] : params[2]);
2686  }
2687 
2688  if (!params[0]->getSort()->isRoundingMode()) {
2689  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2690  "First parameter of fp.mul must be a rounding mode",
2691  line_number);
2692  return mkUnknown();
2693  }
2694 
2695  if (!isFpParam(params[1]) || !isFpParam(params[2])) {
2696  err_all(
2697  ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2698  "Second and third parameters of fp.mul must be floating point numbers",
2699  line_number);
2700  return mkUnknown();
2701  }
2702 
2703  std::shared_ptr<Sort> result_sort = params[1]->getSort();
2704  if (!(*result_sort == *params[2]->getSort())) {
2705  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2706  "Floating point operands must have the same sort",
2707  line_number);
2708  return mkUnknown();
2709  }
2710 
2711  return mkOper(result_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MUL, params);
2712 }
2713 /*
2714 (fp.div RoundingMode FloatingPoint FloatingPoint), return FloatingPoint
2715 */
2716 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2717 Parser::mkFpDiv(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2718  if (params.size() != 3) {
2719  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS,
2720  "fp.div requires exactly 3 parameters: RoundingMode, "
2721  "FloatingPoint, FloatingPoint",
2722  line_number);
2723  return mkUnknown();
2724  }
2725 
2726  if (params[0]->isErr() || params[1]->isErr() || params[2]->isErr()) {
2727  return params[0]->isErr() ? params[0]
2728  : (params[1]->isErr() ? params[1] : params[2]);
2729  }
2730 
2731  if (!params[0]->getSort()->isRoundingMode()) {
2732  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2733  "First parameter of fp.div must be a rounding mode",
2734  line_number);
2735  return mkUnknown();
2736  }
2737 
2738  if (!isFpParam(params[1]) || !isFpParam(params[2])) {
2739  err_all(
2740  ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2741  "Second and third parameters of fp.div must be floating point numbers",
2742  line_number);
2743  return mkUnknown();
2744  }
2745 
2746  std::shared_ptr<Sort> result_sort = params[1]->getSort();
2747  if (!(*result_sort == *params[2]->getSort())) {
2748  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2749  "Floating point operands must have the same sort",
2750  line_number);
2751  return mkUnknown();
2752  }
2753 
2754  return mkOper(result_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_DIV, params);
2755 }
2756 /*
2757 (fp.abs Fp), return Fp
2758 */
2759 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpAbs(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2760  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
2761  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_abs", line_number);
2762  return mkUnknown();
2763  }
2764 
2765  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ABS, param);
2766 }
2767 /*
2768 (fp.neg Fp), return Fp
2769 */
2770 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpNeg(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2771  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
2772  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_neg", line_number);
2773  return mkUnknown();
2774  }
2775 
2776  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_FP_NEG, param);
2777 }
2778 /*
2779 (fp.rem Fp Fp), return Fp
2780 */
2781 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpRem(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2782  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2783  if (!isFpParam(l) || !isFpParam(r)) {
2784  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_rem", line_number);
2785  return mkUnknown();
2786  }
2787 
2788  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_FP_REM, l, r);
2789 }
2790 /*
2791 (fp.fma RoundingMode Fp Fp Fp), return Fp
2792 */
2793 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2794 Parser::mkFpFma(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2795  if (params.size() != 4) {
2796  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS,
2797  "fp.fma requires exactly 4 parameters: RoundingMode Fp Fp Fp",
2798  line_number);
2799  return mkUnknown();
2800  }
2801 
2802  // Check if first parameter is rounding mode
2803  if (!params[0]->getSort()->isRoundingMode()) {
2804  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2805  "First parameter must be a rounding mode in fp.fma",
2806  line_number);
2807  return mkUnknown();
2808  }
2809 
2810  // Check if other parameters are floating point
2811  for (size_t i = 1; i < params.size(); i++) {
2812  if (params[i]->isErr())
2813  return params[i];
2814  if (!isFpParam(params[i])) {
2815  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2816  "Parameters 2-4 must be floating point in fp.fma",
2817  line_number);
2818  return mkUnknown();
2819  }
2820  }
2821 
2822  // All floating point parameters should have the same sort
2823  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = params[1]->getSort();
2824  for (size_t i = 2; i < params.size(); i++) {
2825  if (!(*params[i]->getSort() == *sort)) {
2826  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
2827  "All floating point parameters must have the same sort in fp.fma",
2828  line_number);
2829  return mkUnknown();
2830  }
2831  }
2832 
2833  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_FMA, params);
2834 }
2835 /*
2836 (fp.sqrt RoundingMode Fp), return Fp
2837 */
2838 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpSqrt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> rm,
2839  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2840  if (rm->isErr() || param->isErr())
2841  return rm->isErr() ? rm : param;
2842 
2843  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
2844  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_sqrt", line_number);
2845  return mkUnknown();
2846  }
2847 
2848  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_FP_SQRT, rm, param);
2849 }
2850 /*
2851 (fp.sqrt Fp), return Fp
2852 */
2853 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpSqrt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2854  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
2855  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_sqrt", line_number);
2856  return mkUnknown();
2857  }
2858 
2859  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_FP_SQRT, param);
2860 }
2861 /*
2862 (fp.roundToIntegral RoundingMode Fp), return Fp
2863 */
2864 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2865 Parser::mkFpRoundToIntegral(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> rm,
2866  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2867  if (rm->isErr() || param->isErr())
2868  return rm->isErr() ? rm : param;
2869 
2870  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
2871  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_roundToIntegral", line_number);
2872  return mkUnknown();
2873  }
2874 
2875  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ROUND_TO_INTEGRAL, rm, param);
2876 }
2877 /*
2878 (fp.roundToIntegral Fp), return Fp
2879 */
2880 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2881 Parser::mkFpRoundToIntegral(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
2882  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
2883  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_roundToIntegral", line_number);
2884  return mkUnknown();
2885  }
2886 
2887  return mkOper(param->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ROUND_TO_INTEGRAL, param);
2888 }
2889 /*
2890 (fp.min Fp+), return Fp
2891 */
2892 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpMin(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2893  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2894  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(l, r);
2895 
2896  if (sort == nullptr) {
2897  sort = l->getSort();
2898  }
2899 
2900  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MIN, l, r);
2901 }
2902 /*
2903 (fp.max Fp+), return Fp
2904 */
2905 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpMax(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
2906  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
2907  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(l, r);
2908 
2909  if (sort == nullptr) {
2910  sort = l->getSort();
2911  }
2912 
2913  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MAX, l, r);
2914 }
2915 // FLOATING POINT COMP
2916 /*
2917 (fp.leq Fp Fp), return Bool
2918 */
2919 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2920 Parser::mkFpLe(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2921  // if (!isFpParam(l) || !isFpParam(r)) {
2922  // err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_le",
2923  // line_number); return mkUnknown();
2924  // }
2925  // Note: Cannot simplify (fp.le x x) to true because x might be NaN, and (NaN
2926  // <= NaN) is false
2927 
2928  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_LE, params);
2929 }
2930 /*
2931 (fp.lt Fp Fp), return Bool
2932 */
2933 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2934 Parser::mkFpLt(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2935  // if (!isFpParam(l) || !isFpParam(r)) {
2936  // err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_lt",
2937  // line_number); return mkUnknown();
2938  // }
2939  // Note: Cannot simplify (fp.lt x x) to false without knowing if x is NaN
2940  // While the result is always false, we should not simplify at parse time
2941  // std::cout << "mkFpLt called" << std::endl;
2942  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_LT, params);
2943 }
2944 /*
2945 (fp.geq Fp Fp), return Bool
2946 */
2947 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2948 Parser::mkFpGe(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2949  // if (!isFpParam(l) || !isFpParam(r)) {
2950  // err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_ge",
2951  // line_number); return mkUnknown();
2952  // }
2953  // Note: Cannot simplify (fp.ge x x) to true because x might be NaN, and (NaN
2954  // >= NaN) is false std::cout << "mkFpGe called" << std::endl;
2955  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_GE, params);
2956 }
2957 /*
2958 (fp.gt Fp Fp), return Bool
2959 */
2960 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2961 Parser::mkFpGt(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2962  // if (!isFpParam(l) || !isFpParam(r)) {
2963  // err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_gt",
2964  // line_number); return mkUnknown();
2965  // }
2966  // Note: Cannot simplify (fp.gt x x) to false without knowing if x is NaN
2967  // While the result is always false, we should not simplify at parse time
2968  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_GT, params);
2969 }
2970 /*
2971 (fp.eq Fp Fp), return Bool
2972 */
2973 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
2974 Parser::mkFpEq(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
2975  // if (!isFpParam(l) || !isFpParam(r)) {
2976  // err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_eq",
2977  // line_number); return mkUnknown();
2978  // }
2979  // Note: Cannot simplify (fp.eq x x) to true because x might be NaN, and (NaN
2980  // == NaN) is false per IEEE-754
2981 
2982  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_EQ, params);
2983 }
2984 // FLOATING POINT CONVERSION
2985 /*
2986 (fp.to_ubv Fp), return Bv
2987 */
2988 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpToUbv(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> rm,
2989  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param,
2990  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> size) {
2991  if (!rm->getSort()->isRoundingMode() || !isFpParam(param) ||
2992  !isIntParam(size)) {
2993  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_to_ubv", line_number);
2994  return mkUnknown();
2995  }
2996 
2997  if (param->isCBV() && size->isCBV()) {
2998  return mkConstBv(
2999  FloatingPointUtils::fpToUbv(param->toString(), toInt(size)),
3000  toInt(size).toULong());
3001  }
3002 
3003  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort =
3004  sort_manager->createBVSort(toInt(size).toULong());
3005 
3006  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_UBV, rm, param, size);
3007 }
3008 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpToSbv(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> rm,
3009  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param,
3010  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> size) {
3011  if (!rm->getSort()->isRoundingMode() || !isFpParam(param) ||
3012  !isIntParam(size)) {
3013  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_to_sbv", line_number);
3014  return mkUnknown();
3015  }
3016 
3017  if (param->isCBV() && size->isCBV()) {
3018  return mkConstBv(
3019  FloatingPointUtils::fpToSbv(param->toString(), toInt(size)),
3020  toInt(size).toULong());
3021  }
3022 
3023  std::shared_ptr<Sort> new_sort =
3024  sort_manager->createBVSort(toInt(size).toULong());
3025 
3026  return mkOper(new_sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_SBV, rm, param, size);
3027 }
3028 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpToReal(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3029  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
3030  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_to_real", line_number);
3031  return mkUnknown();
3032  }
3033 
3034  return mkOper(SortManager::REAL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_REAL, param);
3035 }
3036 /*
3037 (to_fp eb sb param), return Fp
3038 Supports:
3039 1. ((_ to_fp eb sb) RoundingMode Real) -> params: [eb, sb], args: [RoundingMode,
3040 Real]
3041 2. ((_ to_fp eb sb) RoundingMode (_ BitVec m)) -> params: [eb, sb], args:
3042 [RoundingMode, BitVec]
3043 3. ((_ to_fp eb sb) (_ BitVec m)) -> params: [eb, sb], args: [BitVec]
3044 */
3045 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkToFp(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> eb,
3046  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> sb,
3047  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> rm,
3048  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3049  if (eb->isErr() || sb->isErr() || rm->isErr() || param->isErr())
3050  return eb->isErr() ? eb : (sb->isErr() ? sb : (rm->isErr() ? rm : param));
3051 
3052  // Validate eb and sb are integers
3053  if (!eb->isCInt() && !eb->isConst()) {
3054  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3055  "Exponent width must be an integer in to_fp",
3056  line_number);
3057  return mkUnknown();
3058  }
3059  if (!sb->isCInt() && !sb->isConst()) {
3060  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3061  "Significand width must be an integer in to_fp",
3062  line_number);
3063  return mkUnknown();
3064  }
3065 
3066  // Validate rounding mode
3067  if (!rm->getSort()->isRoundingMode()) {
3068  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3069  "Third parameter must be a rounding mode in to_fp",
3070  line_number);
3071  return mkUnknown();
3072  }
3073 
3074  // Get floating point sort
3075  size_t exponent_width = toInt(eb).toULong();
3076  size_t significand_width = toInt(sb).toULong();
3077  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort =
3078  sort_manager->createFPSort(exponent_width, significand_width);
3079 
3080  // Validate param type
3081  if (!isRealParam(param) && !isBvParam(param) && !isFpParam(param)) {
3082  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3083  "Fourth parameter must be Real, BitVec, or FloatingPoint in to_fp",
3084  line_number);
3085  return mkUnknown();
3086  }
3087 
3088  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> params = {eb, sb, rm, param};
3089  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_FP, params);
3090 }
3091 
3092 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkToFp(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> eb,
3093  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> sb,
3094  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3095  if (eb->isErr() || sb->isErr() || param->isErr())
3096  return eb->isErr() ? eb : (sb->isErr() ? sb : param);
3097 
3098  // Validate eb and sb are integers
3099  if (!eb->isCInt() && !eb->isConst()) {
3100  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3101  "Exponent width must be an integer in to_fp",
3102  line_number);
3103  return mkUnknown();
3104  }
3105  if (!sb->isCInt() && !sb->isConst()) {
3106  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3107  "Significand width must be an integer in to_fp",
3108  line_number);
3109  return mkUnknown();
3110  }
3111 
3112  // Get floating point sort
3113  size_t exponent_width = toInt(eb).toULong();
3114  size_t significand_width = toInt(sb).toULong();
3115  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort =
3116  sort_manager->createFPSort(exponent_width, significand_width);
3117 
3118  // Validate param type (must be BitVec for this overload)
3119  if (!isBvParam(param)) {
3120  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Parameter must be BitVec in to_fp", line_number);
3121  return mkUnknown();
3122  }
3123 
3124  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_FP, eb, sb, param);
3125 }
3126 /*
3127 ((_ to_fp_unsigned eb sb) RoundingMode (_ BitVec m)), return Fp
3128 */
3129 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3130 Parser::mkToFpUnsigned(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> eb, std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> sb, std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> rm, std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3131  if (eb->isErr() || sb->isErr() || rm->isErr() || param->isErr())
3132  return eb->isErr() ? eb : (sb->isErr() ? sb : (rm->isErr() ? rm : param));
3133 
3134  if (!eb->isCInt() && !eb->isConst()) {
3135  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3136  "Exponent width must be an integer in to_fp_unsigned",
3137  line_number);
3138  return mkUnknown();
3139  }
3140  if (!sb->isCInt() && !sb->isConst()) {
3141  // std::cout << kindToString(sb->getKind()) << std::endl;
3142  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3143  "Significand width must be an integer in to_fp_unsigned",
3144  line_number);
3145  return mkUnknown();
3146  }
3147 
3148  size_t exponent_width = toInt(eb).toULong();
3149  size_t significand_width = toInt(sb).toULong();
3150  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort =
3151  sort_manager->createFPSort(exponent_width, significand_width);
3152 
3153  if (!rm->getSort()->isRoundingMode()) {
3154  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3155  "Third parameter must be a rounding mode in to_fp_unsigned",
3156  line_number);
3157  return mkUnknown();
3158  }
3159 
3160  if (!isBvParam(param)) {
3161  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3162  "Fourth parameter must be BitVec in to_fp_unsigned",
3163  line_number);
3164  return mkUnknown();
3165  }
3166 
3167  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> params = {eb, sb, rm, param};
3168  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_FP_UNSIGNED, params);
3169 }
3170 /*
3171 (fp sign exp mant), return Fp
3172 */
3173 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpConst(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> sign,
3174  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> exp,
3175  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> mant) {
3176  if (sign->isErr() || exp->isErr() || mant->isErr())
3177  return sign->isErr() ? sign : (exp->isErr() ? exp : mant);
3178 
3179  if (!isBvParam(sign) || !isBvParam(exp) || !isBvParam(mant)) {
3180  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS,
3181  "All parameters must be BitVec in fp constant",
3182  line_number);
3183  return mkUnknown();
3184  }
3185 
3186  size_t sign_width = sign->getSort()->getBitWidth();
3187  size_t exp_width = exp->getSort()->getBitWidth();
3188  size_t mant_width = mant->getSort()->getBitWidth();
3189 
3190  if (sign_width != 1) {
3191  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Sign bit must be 1 bit wide", line_number);
3192  return mkUnknown();
3193  }
3194 
3195  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort =
3196  sort_manager->createFPSort(exp_width, mant_width + 1);
3197  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children = {sign, exp, mant};
3198  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_CONST, "(fp_bit_representation)", children);
3199 }
3200 // FLOATING POINT PROPERTIES
3201 /*
3202 (fp.isNormal Fp), return Bool
3203 */
3204 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpIsNormal(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3205  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
3206  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_isNormal", line_number);
3207  return mkUnknown();
3208  }
3209 
3210  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_NORMAL, param);
3211 }
3212 /*
3213 (fp.isSubnormal Fp), return Bool
3214 */
3215 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3216 Parser::mkFpIsSubnormal(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3217  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
3218  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_isSubnormal", line_number);
3219  return mkUnknown();
3220  }
3221 
3222  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_SUBNORMAL, param);
3223 }
3224 /*
3225 (fp.isZero Fp), return Bool
3226 */
3227 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpIsZero(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3228  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
3229  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_isZero", line_number);
3230  return mkUnknown();
3231  }
3232 
3233  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_ZERO, param);
3234 }
3235 /*
3236 (fp.isInfinite Fp), return Bool
3237 */
3238 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpIsInf(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3239  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
3240  err_all(param, "Expected floating-point parameter", line_number);
3241  return mkUnknown();
3242  }
3243 
3244  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_INF, param);
3245 }
3246 /*
3247 (fp.isNaN Fp), return Bool
3248 */
3249 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpIsNaN(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3250  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
3251  err_all(param, "Expected floating-point parameter", line_number);
3252  return mkUnknown();
3253  }
3254 
3255  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_NAN, param);
3256 }
3257 /*
3258 (fp.isNegative Fp), return Bool
3259 */
3260 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpIsNeg(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3261  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
3262  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_isNeg", line_number);
3263  return mkUnknown();
3264  }
3265 
3266  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_NEG, param);
3267 }
3268 /*
3269 (fp.isPositive Fp), return Bool
3270 */
3271 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkFpIsPos(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3272  if (!isFpParam(param)) {
3273  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in fp_isPos", line_number);
3274  return mkUnknown();
3275  }
3276 
3277  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_POS, param);
3278 }
3279 // ARRAY
3280 /*
3281 (select Array Int/BV), return Int/BV
3282 */
3283 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkSelect(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3284  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3285  if (!isArrayParam(l)) {
3286  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in select", line_number);
3287  return mkUnknown();
3288  }
3289 
3290  return mkOper(l->getSort()->getElemSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_SELECT, l, r);
3291 }
3292 /*
3293 (store Array Int Int), return Array
3294 */
3295 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStore(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3296  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3297  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> v) {
3298  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || v->isErr())
3299  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3300  // if (!isArrayParam(l) || (!isIntParam(r) && !isBvParam(r))) {
3301  // err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in store",
3302  // line_number); return mkUnknown();
3303  // }
3304 
3305  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_STORE, l, r, v);
3306 }
3307 // STRINGS COMMON OPERATORS
3308 /*
3309 (str.len Str), return Nat
3310 */
3311 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrLen(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3312  if (!isStrParam(param)) {
3313  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_len", line_number);
3314  return mkUnknown();
3315  }
3316 
3317  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_LEN, param);
3318 }
3319 /*
3320 (str.++ Str Str+), return Str
3321 */
3322 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3323 Parser::mkStrConcat(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
3324  if (params.size() == 0) {
3325  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for str_concat", line_number);
3326  return mkUnknown();
3327  }
3328  else if (params.size() == 1) {
3329  return params[0];
3330  }
3331  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
3332 
3333  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
3334  if (params[i]->isErr())
3335  return params[i];
3336  if (!isStrParam(params[i])) {
3337  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_concat", line_number);
3338  return mkUnknown();
3339  }
3340  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
3341  }
3342 
3343  if (new_params.size() == 0)
3344  return mkConstStr("");
3345  if (new_params.size() == 1)
3346  return new_params[0];
3347  return mkOper(SortManager::STR_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_CONCAT, new_params);
3348 }
3349 /*
3350 (str.substr Str Int Int), return Str
3351 */
3352 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrSubstr(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3353  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3354  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> s) {
3355  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || s->isErr())
3356  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3357  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isIntParam(r) || !isIntParam(s)) {
3358  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_substr", line_number);
3359  return mkUnknown();
3360  }
3361 
3362  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SUBSTR, l, r, s);
3363 }
3364 /*
3365 (str.prefixof Str Str), return Bool
3366 */
3367 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrPrefixof(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3368  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3369  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isStrParam(r)) {
3370  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_prefixof", line_number);
3371  return mkUnknown();
3372  }
3373 
3374  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_PREFIXOF, l, r);
3375 }
3376 /*
3377 (str.suffixof Str Str), return Bool
3378 */
3379 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrSuffixof(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3380  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3381  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isStrParam(r)) {
3382  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_suffixof", line_number);
3383  return mkUnknown();
3384  }
3385 
3386  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SUFFIXOF, l, r);
3387 }
3388 /*
3389 (str.indexof Str Str Int), return Int
3390 */
3391 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrIndexof(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3392  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3393  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> s) {
3394  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || s->isErr())
3395  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3396  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isStrParam(r) || !isIntParam(s)) {
3397  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_indexof", line_number);
3398  return mkUnknown();
3399  }
3400 
3401  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_INDEXOF, l, r, s);
3402 }

3404 (str.at Str Int), return Str
3405 */
3406 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrCharat(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3407  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3408  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
3409  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_charat", line_number);
3410  return mkUnknown();
3411  }
3412 
3413  return mkOper(SortManager::STR_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_CHARAT, l, r);
3414 }
3415 /*
3416 (str.update Str Int Str), return Str
3417 */
3418 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrUpdate(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3419  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3420  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> v) {
3421  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || v->isErr())
3422  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3423  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isIntParam(r) || !isStrParam(v)) {
3424  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_update", line_number);
3425  return mkUnknown();
3426  }
3427 
3428  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_STR_UPDATE, l, r, v);
3429 }
3430 /*
3431 (str.replace Str Str Str), return Str
3432 */
3433 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrReplace(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3434  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3435  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> v) {
3436  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || v->isErr())
3437  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3438  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isStrParam(r) || !isStrParam(v)) {
3439  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_replace", line_number);
3440  return mkUnknown();
3441  }
3442 
3443  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE, l, r, v);
3444 }
3445 /*
3446 (str.replace_all Str Str Str), return Str
3447 */
3448 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrReplaceAll(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3449  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3450  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> v) {
3451  if (!isStrParam(l)) {
3452  err_all(l, "Expected string parameter", line_number);
3453  return mkUnknown();
3454  }
3455  if (!isStrParam(r)) {
3456  err_all(r, "Expected string parameter", line_number);
3457  return mkUnknown();
3458  }
3459  if (!isStrParam(v)) {
3460  err_all(v, "Expected string parameter", line_number);
3461  return mkUnknown();
3462  }
3463  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE_ALL, l, r, v);
3464 }

3466 (str.replace_re Str Reg Str), return Str
3467 */

3470  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> v) {
3471  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || v->isErr())
3472  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3473  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isRegParam(r) || !isStrParam(v)) {
3474  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_replace_re", line_number);
3475  return mkUnknown();
3476  }
3477  return mkOper(l->getSort(), NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE_REG, l, r, v);
3478 }

3481 (str.replace_re_all Str Reg Str), return Str

3544 (str.split Str Str), return (_ Array Int Str)

3546 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrSplit(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3547  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3548  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isStrParam(r)) {

3550  return mkUnknown();
3551  }
3552  return mkOper(sort_manager->createArraySort(SortManager::INT_SORT,
3553  SortManager::STR_SORT),
3554  NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SPLIT,
3555  l,
3556  r);

3635 Parser::mkStrLe(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {

3642 Parser::mkStrGt(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {

3653 // STRINGS PROPERTIES
3654 /*
3655 (str.in_re Str Reg), return Bool
3656 */
3657 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrInReg(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3658  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3659  if (!isStrParam(l)) {
3660  err_all(l, "Expected string parameter", line_number);
3661  return mkUnknown();
3662  }
3663  if (!isRegParam(r)) {
3664  err_all(r, "Expected regex parameter", line_number);
3665  return mkUnknown();
3666  }
3667  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_IN_REG, l, r);
3668 }
3669 /*
3670 (str.contains Str Str), return Bool
3671 */
3672 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrContains(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3673  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3674  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isStrParam(r)) {
3675  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_contains", line_number);
3676  return mkUnknown();
3677  }
3678 
3679  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_CONTAINS, l, r);
3680 }

3682 (str.is_digit Str), return Bool
3683 */
3684 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrIsDigit(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3685  if (!isStrParam(param)) {
3686  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_is_digit", line_number);
3687  return mkUnknown();
3688  }
3689 
3690  return mkOper(SortManager::BOOL_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_IS_DIGIT, param);
3691 }

3694  if (!isIntParam(param)) {
3695  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_from_int", line_number);

3697  }
3698 
3699  return mkOper(SortManager::STR_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_FROM_INT, param);

3702 (str.to_int Str), return Int

3706  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_to_int", line_number);

3708  }

3717  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_to_reg", line_number);
3718  return mkUnknown();
3719  }
3720 
3721  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_TO_REG, param);

3724 (str.to_code Str), return Int
3725 */
3726 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrToCode(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {

3728  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_to_code", line_number);
3729  return mkUnknown();
3730  }
3731

3735 (str.from_code Int), return Str

3737 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkStrFromCode(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3738  if (!isIntParam(param)) {
3739  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_from_code", line_number);

3745 // STRINGS RE CONSTANTS
3746 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegNone() { return mkConstReg("re.none"); }
3747 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegAll() { return mkConstReg("re.all"); }
3748 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegAllChar() {
3749  return mkConstReg("re.allchar");
3750 }
3751 // STRINGS RE COMMON OPERATORS
3752 /*
3753 (re.++ Reg Reg+), return Reg
3754 */
3755 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3756 Parser::mkRegConcat(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
3757  if (params.size() == 0) {
3758  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for reg_concat", line_number);
3759  return mkUnknown();
3760  }
3761  else if (params.size() == 1) {
3762  return params[0];
3763  }
3764  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
3765 
3766  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
3767  if (params[i]->isErr())
3768  return params[i];
3769  if (!isRegParam(params[i])) {
3770  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_concat", line_number);
3771  return mkUnknown();
3772  }
3773  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
3774  }
3775 
3776  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_CONCAT, new_params);
3777 }
3778 /*
3779 (re.union Reg Reg+), return Reg
3780 */
3781 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3782 Parser::mkRegUnion(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
3783  if (params.size() == 0) {
3784  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for reg_union", line_number);
3785  return mkUnknown();
3786  }
3787  else if (params.size() == 1) {
3788  return params[0];
3789  }
3790  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
3791 
3792  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
3793  if (params[i]->isErr())
3794  return params[i];
3795  if (!isRegParam(params[i])) {
3796  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_union", line_number);
3797  return mkUnknown();
3798  }
3799  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
3800  }
3801 
3802  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_UNION, new_params);
3803 }
3804 /*
3805 (re.inter Reg Reg+), return Reg
3806 */
3807 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3808 Parser::mkRegInter(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
3809  if (params.size() == 0) {
3810  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for reg_inter", line_number);
3811  return mkUnknown();
3812  }
3813  else if (params.size() == 1) {
3814  return params[0];
3815  }
3816  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
3817 
3818  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size(); i++) {
3819  if (params[i]->isErr())
3820  return params[i];
3821  if (!isRegParam(params[i])) {
3822  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_inter", line_number);
3823  return mkUnknown();
3824  }
3825  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
3826  }
3827 
3828  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_INTER, new_params);
3829 }
3830 /*
3831 (re.diff Reg Reg), return Reg
3832 */
3833 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3834 Parser::mkRegDiff(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
3835  if (params.size() != 2) {
3836  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for reg_diff", line_number);
3837  return mkUnknown();
3838  }
3839  if (params[0]->isErr() || params[1]->isErr())
3840  return params[0]->isErr() ? params[0] : params[1];
3841  if (!isRegParam(params[0]) || !isRegParam(params[1])) {
3842  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_diff", line_number);
3843  return mkUnknown();
3844  }
3845 
3846  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_DIFF, params[0], params[1]);
3847 }
3848 /*
3849 (re.* Reg), return Reg
3850 */
3851 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegStar(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3852  if (!isRegParam(param)) {
3853  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_star", line_number);
3854  return mkUnknown();
3855  }
3856 
3857  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_STAR, param);
3858 }
3859 /*
3860 (re.+ Reg), return Reg
3861 */
3862 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegPlus(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3863  if (!isRegParam(param)) {
3864  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_plus", line_number);
3865  return mkUnknown();
3866  }
3867 
3868  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_PLUS, param);
3869 }
3870 /*
3871 (re.opt Reg), return Reg
3872 */
3873 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegOpt(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3874  if (!isRegParam(param)) {
3875  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_opt", line_number);
3876  return mkUnknown();
3877  }
3878 
3879  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_OPT, param);
3880 }
3881 /*
3882 (re.range Str Str), return Reg
3883 */
3884 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegRange(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3885  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3886  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isStrParam(r)) {
3887  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_range", line_number);
3888  return mkUnknown();
3889  }
3890 
3891  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_RANGE, l, r);
3892 }
3893 /*
3894 (reg.^n Reg Int), return Reg
3895 */
3896 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegRepeat(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3897  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3898  // e.g. (re.^ (str.to.re "a") 3)
3899 
3900  if (!isRegParam(l) || !isIntParam(r)) {
3901  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_repeat", line_number);
3902  return mkUnknown();
3903  }
3904 
3905  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_REPEAT, l, r);
3906 }
3907 /*
3908 (re.loop Reg Int Int), return Reg
3909 */
3910 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRegLoop(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3911  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3912  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> s) {
3913  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || s->isErr())
3914  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3915  if (!isRegParam(l) || !isIntParam(r) || !isIntParam(s)) {
3916  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_loop", line_number);
3917  return mkUnknown();
3918  }
3919 
3920  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_LOOP, l, r, s);
3921 }
3922 /*
3923 (re.comp Reg), return Reg
3924 */
3925 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3926 Parser::mkRegComplement(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> param) {
3927  if (!isRegParam(param)) {
3928  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in reg_complement", line_number);
3929  return mkUnknown();
3930  }
3931 
3932  return mkOper(SortManager::REG_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_REG_COMPLEMENT, param);
3933 }
3934 // STRINGS RE FUNCTIONS
3935 /*
3936 (str.replace_re Str Reg Str), return Str
3937 */
3938 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkReplaceReg(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3939  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3940  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> v) {
3941  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || v->isErr())
3942  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3943  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isRegParam(r) || !isStrParam(v)) {
3944  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_replace_re", line_number);
3945  return mkUnknown();
3946  }
3947 
3948  return mkOper(SortManager::STR_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE_REG, l, r, v);
3949 }
3950 /*
3951 (str.replace_re_all Str Reg Str), return Str
3952 */
3953 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkReplaceRegAll(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3954  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r,
3955  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> v) {
3956  if (l->isErr() || r->isErr() || v->isErr())
3957  return l->isErr() ? l : r;
3958  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isRegParam(r) || !isStrParam(v)) {
3959  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_replace_re_all", line_number);
3960  return mkUnknown();
3961  }
3962 
3963  return mkOper(SortManager::STR_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE_REG_ALL, l, r, v);
3964 }
3965 /*
3966 (str.indexof_re Str Reg), return Int
3967 */
3968 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkIndexofReg(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> l,
3969  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> r) {
3970  if (!isStrParam(l) || !isRegParam(r)) {
3971  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in str_indexof_re", line_number);
3972  return mkUnknown();
3973  }
3974 
3975  return mkOper(SortManager::INT_SORT, NODE_KIND::NT_STR_INDEXOF_REG, l, r);
3976 }
3977 
3978 // INTERVAL
3979 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
3980 Parser::mkMax(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
3981  if (params.size() == 0) {
3982  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for max", line_number);
3983  return mkUnknown();
3984  }
3985  else if (params.size() == 1) {
3986  return params[0];
3987  }
3988  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
3989 
3990  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
3991 
3992  // pair-wise comparison: (< a b c d) <=> (and (< a b) (< b c) (< c d))
3993  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size() - 1; i++) {
3994  if (params[i]->isErr())
3995  return params[i];
3996  if (sort != nullptr && !params[i]->getSort()->isEqTo(sort)) {
3997  if (canExempt(params[i]->getSort(), sort)) {
3998  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in max, but now exempt for int/real"
3999  << std::endl;
4000  }
4001  else {
4002  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in max", line_number);
4003  return mkUnknown();
4004  }
4005  }
4006  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
4007  }
4008 
4009  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_MAX, new_params);
4010 }
4011 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>
4012 Parser::mkMin(const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &params) {
4013  if (params.size() == 0) {
4014  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_PARAM_MIS, "Not enough parameters for min", line_number);
4015  return mkUnknown();
4016  }
4017  else if (params.size() == 1) {
4018  return params[0];
4019  }
4020  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = getSort(params);
4021 
4022  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> new_params;
4023 
4024  // pair-wise comparison: (< a b c d) <=> (and (< a b) (< b c) (< c d))
4025  for (size_t i = 0; i < params.size() - 1; i++) {
4026  if (params[i]->isErr())
4027  return params[i];
4028  if (sort != nullptr && !params[i]->getSort()->isEqTo(sort)) {
4029  if (canExempt(params[i]->getSort(), sort)) {
4030  std::cerr << "Type mismatch in min, but now exempt for int/real"
4031  << std::endl;
4032  }
4033  else {
4034  err_all(ERROR_TYPE::ERR_TYPE_MIS, "Type mismatch in min", line_number);
4035  return mkUnknown();
4036  }
4037  }
4038  new_params.emplace_back(params[i]);
4039  }
4040 
4041  return mkOper(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_MIN, new_params);
4042 }
4043 
4044 int Parser::getArity(NODE_KIND k) const {
4045  switch (k) {
4046  // zero-ary
4047  case NODE_KIND::NT_NULL:
4048  case NODE_KIND::NT_CONST:
4049  case NODE_KIND::NT_VAR:
4050  case NODE_KIND::NT_TEMP_VAR:
4051  case NODE_KIND::NT_CONST_TRUE:
4052  case NODE_KIND::NT_CONST_FALSE:
4053  case NODE_KIND::NT_CONST_PI:
4054  case NODE_KIND::NT_CONST_E:
4055  case NODE_KIND::NT_INFINITY:
4056  case NODE_KIND::NT_POS_INFINITY:
4057  case NODE_KIND::NT_NEG_INFINITY:
4058  case NODE_KIND::NT_NAN:
4059  case NODE_KIND::NT_EPSILON:
4060  case NODE_KIND::NT_POS_EPSILON:
4061  case NODE_KIND::NT_NEG_EPSILON:
4062  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_NONE:
4063  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_ALL:
4064  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_ALLCHAR:
4065  case NODE_KIND::NT_QUANT_VAR:
4066  return 0;
4067 
4068  // unary
4069  case NODE_KIND::NT_CONST_ARRAY:
4070  case NODE_KIND::NT_NOT:
4071  case NODE_KIND::NT_NEG:
4072  case NODE_KIND::NT_ABS:
4073  case NODE_KIND::NT_SQRT:
4074  case NODE_KIND::NT_SAFESQRT:
4075  case NODE_KIND::NT_CEIL:
4076  case NODE_KIND::NT_FLOOR:
4077  case NODE_KIND::NT_ROUND:
4078  case NODE_KIND::NT_EXP:
4079  case NODE_KIND::NT_LN:
4080  case NODE_KIND::NT_LG:
4081  case NODE_KIND::NT_LB:
4082  case NODE_KIND::NT_SIN:
4083  case NODE_KIND::NT_COS:
4084  case NODE_KIND::NT_SEC:
4085  case NODE_KIND::NT_CSC:
4086  case NODE_KIND::NT_TAN:
4087  case NODE_KIND::NT_COT:
4088  case NODE_KIND::NT_ASIN:
4089  case NODE_KIND::NT_ACOS:
4090  case NODE_KIND::NT_ASEC:
4091  case NODE_KIND::NT_ACSC:
4092  case NODE_KIND::NT_ATAN:
4093  case NODE_KIND::NT_ACOT:
4094  case NODE_KIND::NT_SINH:
4095  case NODE_KIND::NT_COSH:
4096  case NODE_KIND::NT_TANH:
4097  case NODE_KIND::NT_SECH:
4098  case NODE_KIND::NT_CSCH:
4099  case NODE_KIND::NT_COTH:
4100  case NODE_KIND::NT_ASINH:
4101  case NODE_KIND::NT_ACOSH:
4102  case NODE_KIND::NT_ATANH:
4103  case NODE_KIND::NT_ASECH:
4104  case NODE_KIND::NT_ACSCH:
4105  case NODE_KIND::NT_ACOTH:
4106  case NODE_KIND::NT_TO_INT:
4107  case NODE_KIND::NT_TO_REAL:
4108  case NODE_KIND::NT_IS_INT:
4109  case NODE_KIND::NT_IS_PRIME:
4110  case NODE_KIND::NT_IS_EVEN:
4111  case NODE_KIND::NT_IS_ODD:
4112  case NODE_KIND::NT_FACT:
4113  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NOT:
4114  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NEG:
4115  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NEGO:
4116  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ABS:
4117  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_NEG:
4118  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_NORMAL:
4119  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_SUBNORMAL:
4120  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_ZERO:
4121  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_INF:
4122  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_NAN:
4123  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_NEG:
4124  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_IS_POS:
4125  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_REAL:
4126  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_LEN:
4127  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_TO_LOWER:
4128  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_TO_UPPER:
4129  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REV:
4130  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_IS_DIGIT:
4131  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_FROM_INT:
4132  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_TO_INT:
4133  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_TO_REG:
4134  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_TO_CODE:
4135  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_FROM_CODE:
4136  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_STAR:
4137  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_PLUS:
4138  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_OPT:
4139  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_COMPLEMENT:
4140  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_TO_NAT:
4141  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_TO_INT:
4142  case NODE_KIND::NT_UBV_TO_INT:
4143  case NODE_KIND::NT_SBV_TO_INT:
4144  case NODE_KIND::NT_POW2:
4145  return 1;
4146 
4147  // binary
4148  case NODE_KIND::NT_POW:
4149  case NODE_KIND::NT_MOD:
4150  case NODE_KIND::NT_LOG:
4151  case NODE_KIND::NT_ATAN2:
4152  case NODE_KIND::NT_IS_DIVISIBLE:
4153  case NODE_KIND::NT_GCD:
4154  case NODE_KIND::NT_LCM:
4155  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UDIV:
4156  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SDIV:
4157  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UREM:
4158  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SREM:
4159  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UMOD:
4160  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SMOD:
4161  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SDIVO:
4162  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UDIVO:
4163  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SREMO:
4164  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UREMO:
4165  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SMODO:
4166  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UMODO:
4167  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SHL:
4168  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_LSHR:
4169  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ASHR:
4170  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ULT:
4171  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ULE:
4172  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UGT:
4173  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UGE:
4174  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SLT:
4175  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SLE:
4176  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SGT:
4177  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SGE:
4178  case NODE_KIND::NT_NAT_TO_BV:
4179  case NODE_KIND::NT_INT_TO_BV:
4180  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_REM:
4181  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_SQRT:
4182  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ROUND_TO_INTEGRAL:
4183  case NODE_KIND::NT_SELECT:
4184  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_PREFIXOF:
4185  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SUFFIXOF:
4186  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_CHARAT:
4187  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SPLIT:
4188 
4189  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_IN_REG:
4190  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_CONTAINS:
4191  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_NUM_SPLITS_RE:
4192  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_RANGE:
4193  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_REPEAT:
4194  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_REPEAT:
4195  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ZERO_EXT:
4196  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SIGN_EXT:
4197  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ROTATE_LEFT:
4198  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ROTATE_RIGHT:
4199  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MIN:
4200  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MAX:
4201  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_XNOR:
4202  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NAND:
4203  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_NOR:
4204  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SUB:
4205  return 2;
4206 
4207  // ternary
4208  case NODE_KIND::NT_ITE:
4209  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_ADD:
4210  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_SUB:
4211  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_MUL:
4212  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_DIV:
4213  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_UBV:
4214  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_SBV:
4215  case NODE_KIND::NT_STORE:
4216  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SUBSTR:
4217  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_INDEXOF:
4218  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_UPDATE:
4219  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE:
4220  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE_ALL:
4221  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SPLIT_AT:
4222  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SPLIT_REST:
4223  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SPLIT_AT_RE:
4224  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_SPLIT_REST_RE:
4225  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE_REG:
4226  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_REPLACE_REG_ALL:
4227  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_INDEXOF_REG:
4228  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_LOOP:
4229  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_EXTRACT:
4230  return 3;
4231 
4232  // 4-ary
4233  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_FMA:
4234  return 4;
4235 
4236  // n-ary
4237  case NODE_KIND::NT_LE:
4238  case NODE_KIND::NT_LT:
4239  case NODE_KIND::NT_GE:
4240  case NODE_KIND::NT_GT:
4241  case NODE_KIND::NT_EQ:
4242  case NODE_KIND::NT_EQ_BOOL:
4243  case NODE_KIND::NT_EQ_OTHER:
4244  case NODE_KIND::NT_DIV_INT:
4245  case NODE_KIND::NT_DIV_REAL:
4246  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_LT:
4247  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_LE:
4248  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_GT:
4249  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_GE:
4250  case NODE_KIND::NT_DISTINCT:
4251  case NODE_KIND::NT_DISTINCT_BOOL:
4252  case NODE_KIND::NT_DISTINCT_OTHER:
4253  case NODE_KIND::NT_AND:
4254  case NODE_KIND::NT_OR:
4255  case NODE_KIND::NT_IMPLIES:
4256  case NODE_KIND::NT_XOR:
4257  case NODE_KIND::NT_ADD:
4258  case NODE_KIND::NT_MUL:
4259  case NODE_KIND::NT_IAND:
4260  case NODE_KIND::NT_SUB:
4261  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_AND:
4262  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_OR:
4263  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_XOR:
4264  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_COMP:
4265  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_ADD:
4266  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_MUL:
4267  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SADDO:
4268  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UADDO:
4269  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_SMULO:
4270  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_UMULO:
4271  case NODE_KIND::NT_BV_CONCAT:
4272  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_LE:
4273  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_LT:
4274  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_GE:
4275  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_GT:
4276  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_EQ:
4277  case NODE_KIND::NT_STR_CONCAT:
4278  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_CONCAT:
4279  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_UNION:
4280  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_INTER:
4281  case NODE_KIND::NT_REG_DIFF:
4282  case NODE_KIND::NT_FORALL:
4283  case NODE_KIND::NT_EXISTS:
4284  case NODE_KIND::NT_MAX:
4285  case NODE_KIND::NT_MIN:
4286  return -1;
4287  case NODE_KIND::NT_FP_TO_FP: // 3 or 4
4288  return -2;
4289 
4290  default:
4291  return -1;
4292  }
4293 }
4294 
4295 // ROOT OBJECT
4296 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRootObj(std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> expr,
4297  int index) {
4298  if (expr->isErr())
4299  return expr;
4300 
4301  // Create index as integer constant
4302  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> index_node = mkConstInt(index);
4303 
4304  // Create root-obj node with real sort
4305  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = SortManager::REAL_SORT;
4306  std::string name =
4307  "root-obj(" + toString(expr) + "," + std::to_string(index) + ")";
4308  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children = {expr, index_node};
4309 
4310  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_ROOT_OBJ, name, children);
4311 }
4312 
4313 std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> Parser::mkRootOfWithInterval(
4314  const std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> &coeffs,
4315  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> lower_bound,
4316  std::shared_ptr<DAGNode> upper_bound) {
4317  if (lower_bound->isErr())
4318  return lower_bound;
4319  if (upper_bound->isErr())
4320  return upper_bound;
4321 
4322  // Check if any coefficient has error
4323  for (const auto &coeff : coeffs) {
4324  if (coeff->isErr())
4325  return coeff;
4326  }
4327 
4328  // Create root-of-with-interval node with real sort
4329  std::shared_ptr<Sort> sort = SortManager::REAL_SORT;
4330 
4331  // Build name string
4332  std::string name = "root-of-with-interval(coeffs:";
4333  for (size_t i = 0; i < coeffs.size(); i++) {
4334  if (i > 0)
4335  name += ",";
4336  name += toString(coeffs[i]);
4337  }
4338  name += ",lb:" + toString(lower_bound) + ",ub:" + toString(upper_bound) + ")";
4339 
4340  // Create children vector: coefficients + bounds
4341  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<DAGNode>> children;
4342  children.insert(children.end(), coeffs.begin(), coeffs.end());
4343  children.push_back(lower_bound);
4344  children.push_back(upper_bound);
4345 
4346  return node_manager->createNode(sort, NODE_KIND::NT_ROOT_OF_WITH_INTERVAL, name, children);
4347 }
4348 } // namespace stabilizer::parser
